title: Accounts Payable
description:
ACCOUNTS PAYABLE JOB DESCRIPTION



Source Buy Sell is a company which provides businesses with top-offshore procurement, AR, AP and CSR services in Australia.

We are looking for Accounts Payable Agents (AP CLERK) who will be based in their own home office.

This role is a full-time job, from Monday to Friday. 

Our aim is to form long- term relationships with our customers, suppliers, and staff to ensure that we build trust and ensure a sustainable high-quality of work end-to-end.



SBS is built around five key pillars:

1. Reducing our client’s expense bases

2. Sourcing sustainable products & services which lead to long term relationships.

3. Never compromising on quality

4. Future proofing companies processes by implementing controls & processes which are scalable up and down.

5. Respect, Respond and React to all our customer needs.



SKILLS AP CLERK

1. You must have a high degree and exceptional eye for detail.

2. Data Entry and Analytics experience.

3. Invoice Processing experience.

4. Purchase Order Creation experience.

5. Statement Reconciliation experience.

6.
 Management experience.

7. Excellent Excel Spreadsheet experience.



MUST HAVEs.

• Accounts Payable Experience

• Excellent English communication skills both written and verbal.

• Knowledgeable in using Microsoft Office and applications, particularly MS EXCEL and MS OUTLOOK.

• Ability to multi-task, is flexible and shows eagerness to learn and be trained.

• Possess the values of importance, respect, diligence, patience, loyalty, honesty, and integrity.

• Right attitude and work ethic in dealing with high-stake tasks and with little to no margin for errors.

• Preference is given to applicants who have SAP, XERO, or FILEBOUND experience.





REMUNERATION and WHAT WE PROVIDE

• Work Hours: 8.30am to 5.00pm (Melbourne Australian Time Zone).

• Salary per month starts at 21,000 pesos during 3-month probation period

• Salary will be 23,000 pesos after completing probation period

• Salary is paid every 15th or 16th of the month

• Annual Increase: 1,000 PESO anniversary date

• Holidays: 20 days paid holiday per year accrued

• Sick Leave: 10 days paid sick leave per year accrued, with medical certificate provided

• Bonus: Additional Month Salary each DECEMBER (pro-rata). Note: 13th month bonus is only applicable to staff who are still with the company on month of December.

• Public Holidays: Australian Public Holidays



EQUIPMENT YOU NEED

• Stable and a strong internet connection

• Back-ups for any internet or power interruptions

• Quality headphones

• PC/LAPTOP with extra screen

• Clear Quality Web Cam

description:

title: Operations Manager / Team Leader (Microloans – Night Shift, Remote)
description:
Operations Manager / Team Leader (Microloans – Night Shift, Remote)



We are a Canadian company based in Quebec, operating in the microloans industry across Canada, providing loans ranging from $250 to $2,500 nationwide.



We are currently looking for a highly organized and proactive Operations Manager / Team Leader to supervise employees and support multiple areas of our daily lending and collections operations.



This is a hands-on leadership role. The selected candidate must be capable of supervising staff while also performing operational tasks when needed.



About the Role



This is a multi-function operations leadership position, not a single-task job.



You will supervise employees responsible for loan approvals and collections, support team performance, and step in when necessary to ensure continuity of operations.



The ideal candidate is comfortable working in a fast-paced financial services environment and managing responsibilities independently.



Key Responsibilities



• Supervise employees handling loan approvals and collections

• Support and guide tea
mbers in their daily responsibilities

• Replace staff members when they are absent or unavailable

• Review and approve microloan applications according to company procedures

• Perform collections activities with clients across Canada

• Train employees on approval and collections processes

• Coordinate daily operational tasks across tea
mbers

• Prepare and manage employee work schedules

• Organize and maintain company documentation and internal records

• Support leadership with operational priorities

• Suggest workflow improvements and efficiency strategies

• Help ensure smooth operations across departments



This role requires someone capable of both leading the team and performing the same operational tasks when required.



Required Tools & Technical Skills



Candidates should already be comfortable using — or able to quickly learn — the following tools:



• 

• Microsoft Word

• Microsoft Excel

• Zapier

• Sloan (or similar lending / CRM platforms)



Strong digital adaptability is essential. Experience with AI-based productivity tools is considered a strong advantage.



The ideal candidate is comfortable:



• learning new systems quickly

• working independently with minimal supervision

• taking initiative to complete tasks proactively

• optimizing workflows using available software tools

• adapting to new technologies as operations evolve



Important Requirements



The candidate must feel comfortable working with:



• Microloan clients

• Loan approval processes

• Collections processes

• Remote employee coordination

• Financial services operational workflows



Experience in Canada or the United States lending environment is a strong advantage ?



Requirements



• Previous experience in lending, collections, or financial services

• Experience supervising or supporting employees

• Strong organizational and multitasking skills

• Ability to approve loan files independently

• Ability to perform collections activities when required

• Strong computer and digital tools proficiency

• Strong problem-solving ability

• Excellent communication skills

• Ability to take initiative without waiting for instructions

• Comfortable adapting to new software and AI tools

• Filipino and English bilingualism required

• Additional languages are an asset



Work Conditions



• Fully remote position

• Night shift schedule required ????

• Salary paid in Canadian dollars (CAD)

• Full-time long-term opportunity

• Work with a stable Canadian company

• Growth potential within the organization ????



Application Requirement (Video Required)



To apply, candidates must submit:



Updated CV

A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing:



• who you are

• your experience in lending or collections

• your experience supervising employees

• whether you have worked with Canadian or U.S. financial workflows

• your experience using the software tools listed above



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: VA | Service based business
description:
Title:

Virtual Assistant — Systems Builder, Customer Follow-Up & Social Media | Golden Mobile Detailing



Hey, I'm Paxton, owner of Golden Mobile Detailing, a mobile auto detailing company in Wisconsin (United States). We're growing fast, and we need a sharp VA who can help us build out the systems and SOPs that will allow us to scale and then stay on to run those systems day-to-day.

This isn't a "data entry" role. We want someone who thinks, takes initiative, and actually cares about doing excellent work. You'll work directly with our team.



What you'll do:

- BUILD SYSTEMS & SOPs (primary focus): Create and organize the internal playbooks, workflows, and standard operating procedures in Notion that our team uses to run and scale the business. This is the core of the role. If you love building structure and making things run smoothly, this is for you.



- CUSTOMER FOLLOW-UP: Text and follow up with customers after their service. Check-ins, rebooking reminders, review requests, and referral prompts. You'll manage this communication using our templates and scripts.



- LEAD FOLLOW-UP: Respond to DMs and inquiries coming in through Instagram and
, and follow up with leads until they book.



-SOCIAL MEDIA: Schedule content, write captions, and help keep our Instagram and
 active and professional.



-
 MANAGEMENT: Handle
 inquiries and communicate with customers professionally on behalf of Golden.



- GENERAL ADMIN: Light scheduling, Slack updates, and other support tasks as needed.



What we're looking for:

- Excellent written English - your communication represents our brand. Experience building SOPs, workflows, or systems is required, not a bonus. Organized, reliable, and proactive - someone who doesn't wait to be told what to do next. 

Experience with Notion or a strong willingness to learn fast. Comfortable texting and following up with real customers. Familiar with Instagram and
. Available to align with US Central Time hours. Stable internet and a solid home office setup.



Pay & benefits:

Pay depends on experience and skill level at 20–30 hrs/week. Pay is weekly for the first two months, then switches to monthly. We also honor the 13th month bonus every December without exception. 



To apply:

title: AI Image Generation VA — Daily Ad Creative Production (Long-Term)
description:
Dear Candidate,



I run a DTC e-commerce business and I'm looking for a Virtual Assistant with proven experience in AI image generation to support our daily ad creative production.

Your task is straightforward: turn written briefs into scroll-stopping, highly realistic ad visuals — every day, consistently.

This is a focused, output-driven role. It suits someone who is experienced with AI image tools, coachable, and able to deliver ad-ready work without being walked through the basics.

Please read carefully and only apply if you are genuinely confident this role is a good fit for you.



About The Role:

As an AI Image Generation VA, you are responsible for producing a daily batch of AI-generated images (volume varies, typically between 20 and 50).

The main focus is highly realistic native-style visuals for
 ads. Occasionally, other styles will be needed — before/after visuals, clean e-commerce product shots, or advertorial-style imagery.

This is an ongoing, long-term position with consistent daily work.



What You Will Do:

- Produce a daily batch of AI-generated images based on written briefings

- Deliver highly realistic native-style ad visuals as the main output

- Produce other styles occasionally (before/after, product shots, advertorial)

- Upload finished images to a shared Google Drive folder, organised per briefing

- Communicate daily via Slack — progress, questions, and feedback

- Refine output quickly based on coaching and direction



Your Workflow:

- You receive a written brief via Slack each day with a short description per image (concept, setting, persona, mood), sometimes with a reference image

- You generate the images using the AI tool of your choice (Nano Banana is what I use personally, but you're free to use any tool that delivers the required quality)

- You upload the finished images to Google Drive at the end of the workday

- I review and approve — if revisions are needed, you refine based on my feedback



What We're Looking For:

 ad creative?

Marwan

title: Seeking Youtube Video Editor
description:
I am looking for a skilled Video Editor with strong B-roll instincts to edit YouTube videos for my marketing agency's channel. Most videos are talking-head educational content about Google Ads for trades businesses. On the job training and style guides will be provided.



SKILLS

-Video Editing Software (Capcut, Descript, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve or other) (REQUIRED)

-Strong B-roll selection and motion graphics (REQUIRED)

-Ability to create or source animated Google Ads / Google Search mockups (REQUIRED)

-Background music selection

-Basic color correction

-After Effects knowledge (helpful, not required)



YOU

-You are detail-oriented and your edits are clean and polished

-You understand YouTube pacing and what holds viewer attention

-You are punctual and hit deadlines reliably

-You can work independently and solve problems on your own

-You are willing to learn the style of my channel and improve over time



ABOUT ME

-I am the director of Bluelight, a marketing agency based in Auckland, New Zealand. We provide -Google Ads and SEO services trades companies across NZ. The 

 -YouTube channel teaches these businesses how to get more leads online.



TASKS

-Editing raw talking-head footage into polished YouTube videos

-Sourcing and inserting relevant video B-roll and animations

-Adding background music and cleaning audio

-Simple text overlays and chapter markers

-Delivering final files ready to upload



POSITION

-Part-time to start, 10 hours per week. Potential to grow into a long-term role as the channel expands. 

Does this sound like you? Then I look forward to reading your application.



HOW TO APPLY FOR THIS JOB

-Reply and put in your subject line "Rockstar Video Editor - [Your Name]"

-At the top of your message write 3 sentences on why you want this position and why you are a good fit. Do not write more.

-Include 2 links to YouTube videos you edited that best shows your B-roll work.

-Tell me which editing software you use (one word).

-How many Google reviews does my company currently have?

-In one sentence, who do you think the target audience of my YouTube channel is?



Make sure to follow all of the steps above. This is a long-term opportunity with room for growth and raises, so I will only consider serious applicants. If I d
 to interview you, the next step is a paid test task. Do not write more than what I have asked above. If you write more than what is asked, I will not consider your application.



Thank you.

title: Meta ads specialist

/Instagram

title: Accounts Receivable Officer (Onsite – Carmona, Cavite)
description:
We are an Australian-based business with a local team in the Philippines, looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Accounts Receivable Officer to join our team onsite in Carmona, Cavite.



This is a full-time, onsite role working closely with both our Philippine and Australian teams.



You will be responsible for managing invoicing, collections, and customer accounts, while communicating confidently with Australian clients and internal stakeholders. You will play an important role in maintaining accurate financial records and supporting healthy cash flow across the business.



Key Responsibilities

• Issue customer invoices accurately and on time

• Monitor accounts and follow up on outstanding payments

• Communicate with customers via phone and
 in a clear, professional manner

• Reconcile customer accounts and resolve discrepancies

• Allocate payments and process receipts

• Maintain accurate financial records and documentation

• Generate accounts receivable reports

• Assist with month-end processes

• Work closely with internal teams and Australian stakeholders



Required Experience (Essential)

• 2+ years experience in Accounts Receivable or similar finance role

• Proven experience working with Australian clients

• Excellent spoken and written English, with strong phone communication skills

• Confidence handling collections calls and customer follow-ups

• Strong understanding of basic accounting principles

• Experience using accounting software

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong organisational and time management skills

• Ability to work independently



Highly Regarded (Not Essential)

• Knowledge of Australian GST and invoicing practices

• Background in bookkeeping or accounting



Working Structure

• Full-time, onsite role – Carmona, Cavite (this is a requirement)

• Long-term position within a growing team

• Working hours aligned with Australian business operations (AEST)



Application Instructions (Important)

To apply, please follow these instructions carefully:

1. Begin your application with:

"AR Specialist – Carmona"

2. Include the following:

• A link to your resume (Google Drive or similar)

• A short Loom video introducing yourself.

• Your years of Accounts Receivable experience

• Details of your experience working with Australian clients

• The accounting software you have used

• Confirmation you are able to work onsite in Carmona, Cavite

• A short example of how you have handled an overdue account via phone

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: E-Commerce CRO & Creative Strategist (Landing Pages + Conversion Optimization)
description:
We’re looking for a high-level E-Commerce CRO & Creative Strategist who knows how to turn traffic into revenue.



This role combines conversion optimization, landing page execution, copywriting, and creative strategy. You must have real experience building landing pages, writing direct response copy, and developing winning creative angles—not just analyzing data.



You should understand why people buy, and how to align messaging, visuals, and offers to drive results.



This is a performance-driven role. We care about results, speed, and execution.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Build and optimize high-converting landing pages (Shopify or similar platforms)

Write and refine direct response copy across landing pages and funnels

Run and manage A/B tests across product pages, funnels, and offers

Analyze user behavior using tools like Microsoft Clarity, heatmaps, and session recordings

Identify drop-off points and conversion bottlenecks, then implement solutions

Develop and lead creative strategy (angles, hooks, messaging, offers)

Work closely with media buyers and designers to align creatives with on-site experience

Continuously test headlines, offers, layouts, and UX to improve CVR and AOV



What We’re Looking For:



Proven experience working with e-commerce brands (DTC preferred)

Hands-on experience building landing pages (not just giving direction)

Strong copywriting background (direct response focused)

Experience as a creative strategist (angles, hooks, buyer psychology)

Strong understanding of CRO principles and testing frameworks

Experience using Microsoft Clarity or similar tools (Hotjar, etc.)

Ability to interpret data and turn insights into actionable changes

Someone who moves fast, tests often, and focuses on results



Bonus If You Have:



Experience scaling winning funnels

Familiarity with tools like Triple Whale, Google Analytics, or Meta ads



Application Questions (Required):



Please answer all questions below. We will not review applications without detailed responses.



Landing Pages (Show Your Work)

Share 2–4 landing pages you’ve personally built.

For each, include:

Your role (what you specifically did)

The goal of the page

The results (CVR, AOV, revenue, etc.)



CRO Testing Experience

Walk us through a specific A/B test you ran.

What was the hypothesis?

What did you change?

What were the results?

What did you learn?



User Behavior Analysis

Using a tool like Microsoft Clarity or similar, describe a time you identified a conversion issue.

What did you see in the data?

What changes did you make?

What was the outcome?



Creative Strategy & Angles

Give an example of a product or funnel where you developed the creative strategy.

What angle or hook did you choose and why?

How did it translate into the landing page?

What performed best?



Copywriting (Direct Response)

Provide a sample of landing page copy you’ve written (headline + section or full page).

Briefly explain:

Who the target customer was

What pain or desire you focused on

Why you structured it that way

title: Property Accountant – US Real Estate (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
ABOUT THIS JOB



CinRetta Digital is a growing digital firm supporting US-based real estate and property management companies. We are expanding our accounting team and are looking for a skilled Property Accountant who can handle full-cycle property accounting tasks for multiple US client accounts.



This is a long-term, full-time remote role best suited for a Filipino accounting professional who is detail-oriented, self-motivated, and comfortable working independently with US clients.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



• Manage and maintain financial records for US-based property portfolios

• Process accounts payable and receivable for property management operations

• Perform bank reconciliations, tenant ledger reviews, and general ledger maintenance

• Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports

• Assist with budgeting, variance analysis, and operating expense reports

• Coordinate with property managers and clients on billing and collections

• Process rent rolls accurately and on time

• Ensure compliance with US GAAP and applicable accounting standards

• Assist with year-end closing and audit support



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE



• Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or equivalent

• 3+ years of accounting experience (property accounting experience is a big plus)

• Hands-on experience with accounting software: Yardi, MRI, AppFolio, or QuickBooks

• Strong Excel and Google Sheets proficiency

• Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal

• Strong attention to detail, organization, and ability to manage deadlines

• Can work independently and handle multiple client accounts



Nice to Have:

• Prior experience supporting US-based clients in a remote setup

• Familiarity with US GAAP and US real estate accounting workflows

• Experience using Google Workspace, Asana, or Slack



WHAT WE OFFER



• Stable, long-term full-time remote work

• Competitive compensation (to be discussed upon interview)

• Work-from-home setup with flexible and structured workflows

• Opportunity to work with US real estate clients and grow your expertise

• Supportive and collaborative team environment



HOW TO APPLY



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include:

• Your updated resume or CV

• A short cover letter explaining your property accounting experience

• List of accounting software you have worked with

title: Senior SEO Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
We are hiring a Senior SEO Specialist to take ownership of and improve SEO performance across our video gaming marketplace.



You will be the primary driver of SEO improvements across the business, working across technical SEO, content, link building, and analytics to grow traffic and rankings.



This is not a task-only role. We are looking for someone who understands how SEO works end-to-end and can contribute to improving systems, not just executing tasks.



About Us

We operate a large online marketplace in the video gaming services space, with tens of thousands of monthly organic visitors and a high volume of content being produced.



We are looking to significantly scale our SEO performance across both existing and new listings.

Responsibilities



SEO Strategy & Growth

• Support and contribute to SEO growth across the site

• Identify opportunities to improve rankings, traffic, and conversions

• Assist in optimizing both existing and new pages



Link Building

• Manage backlink acquisition and ordering

• Evaluate backlink quality and relevance

• Ensure links are competitively priced and niche-appropriate

• Help maintain and improve backlink profile

• Identify harmful links when necessary



Content & Blog Optimization

• Work with a high volume of blog content (approximately 100 posts per month)

• Improve blog structure, formatting, and SEO optimization

• Help evaluate content performance and identify improvements

• Implement tracking such as UTM parameters on key links



Content Updates

• Assist in maintaining and improving a content update calendar

• Optimize key pages including titles, descriptions, FAQs, and structure



Technical SEO Support

• Assist with identifying technical SEO improvements

• Work with developers to implement updates

• Help improve site structure, indexing, and performance



Analytics & Performance Tracking

• Track and evaluate the effectiveness of blog posts, backlinks, and content clusters

• Monitor rankings, traffic, and performance trends

• Identify what is driving results and what is not

• Help build simple reporting and tracking systems



Requirements (Mandatory)

• Strong working experience across multiple areas of SEO

1) Technical SEO

2) Content SEO

3) Link Building

• Must be experienced with

Semrush

Similarweb

• Strong understanding of modern SEO and AI-assisted workflows

• Experience working with content at scale

• Ability to evaluate backlink quality

• Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving ability

• Ability to understand performance data and make improvements

• Highly organized and capable of working within structured systems

Preferred (Not Required)

• Experience with WordPress or WooCommerce

• Experience working with content teams or writers

• Experience in gaming, marketplaces, or similar niches



What We’re Looking For

We are not looking for a beginner SEO. We are looking for someone who:

• Understands how SEO works across multiple areas

• Can think beyond basic execution

• Can identify issues and suggest improvements

• Is reliable, detail-oriented, and consistent

• Focuses on long-term results



Compensation

• Full-time position, 40 hours per week

• $1,500 to $2,000 USD per month depending on experience

• Long-term role with growth opportunities

• Performance-based increases available



Benefits

• Paid vacation leave after 3 months

• Stable, long-term role with a growing company



Role Details

- Location: Remote (Philippines)

- Working Hours: TBD, Approximately 8 AM – 4 PM Philippine time

- Time Tracking: Required



How to Apply

• Include “CACTUS” in your subject line

• Briefly answer the following:

– What is the largest SEO or content operation you have worked on or contributed to?

– How did you track performance, output, or results?

– What tools or systems did you use to manage workflows or reporting?

– Give one example of how you improved an SEO process or system

• Attach your resume or a link to your LinkedIn profile

Applications that do not answer all questions will not be considered.



Important

Do not apply if you do not have hands-on SEO experience.

You must

• Have real experience working across multiple areas of SEO

• Understand how SEO workflows operate in practice

• Be capable of contributing to improvements, not just executing tasks

This is not a training role.

title: HR COORDINATOR
description:
**HR & Recruitment Coordinator (People-First, High-Impact Role)**



We’re looking for a sharp, people-first **HR & Recruitment Coordinator** who is technically savvy, highly organized, and ready to take ownership from day one.



This is not a placeholder role — we’re building something real, and we need someone who wants to grow with it.



## **WHAT THIS ROLE OWNS**



**Recruitment (50%)**

* Support and execute recruitment processes — sourcing, screening, and coordinating interviews

* Work closely with leadership to identify and attract **high-quality candidates**

* Maintain an organized and efficient candidate pipeline

* Ensure a strong candidate experience from first touchpoint to onboarding



**Client & Growth Support (25%)**



* Assist in identifying and organizing potential client or candidate opportunities

* Support outreach coordination and follow-ups (non-sales focused)

* Help maintain internal tracking systems and pipelines

* Ensure smooth coordination between recruitment efforts and business needs



**Operations & HR Support (25%)**



* Support onboarding processes to ensure new hires are set up for success

* Assist with offboarding and transitions when needed

* Maintain HR documentation, contracts, and internal systems (Notion)

* Help track team compliance and internal processes

* Support day-to-day operational needs as the company grows



**YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:**



* Have solid HR or recruitment experience and understand people, process, and accountability

* Are strong at sourcing and identifying the **right candidates, not just filling roles**

* Are highly proficient in **Notion** and enjoy organizing systems

* Have experience with **AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT)** and are eager to use them to work smarter

* Are technically savvy and quick to learn new tools

* Communicate proactively — you update before being asked

* Can handle sensitive situations with professionalism and discretion

* Thrive in a fast-moving, high-standard environment

* Genuinely care about people and team culture



**THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF YOU:**



* Need constant direction to move forward

* Struggle in fast-paced or evolving environments

* View HR as purely administrative

* Are looking for a short-term or side role



**TO APPLY**

Send your resume + a short 1–2 minute introduction.

We move fast — if you’re the right fit, you’ll know quickly.

title: SEO Specialist

Strong knowledge of Google updates and current SEO best practices

Excellent written English

Your hourly or monthly rate

title: Media Buyer (Facebook Ads) — E-commerce/Dropshipping
description:
Media Buyer 
 Ads) — E-commerce/Dropshipping



Remote • Part-time to Full-time Path



About Us

We’re a fast-growing e-commerce group operating multiple dropshipping brands. We combine rapid testing, sharp creative, and rigorous analytics to launch products that delight customers. You’ll join a lean, ambitious team where your work directly impacts revenue—and where high performers grow quickly.



The Role



As a Media Buyer, you’ll own the end-to-end execution of
 (Meta) acquisition campaigns across several storefronts. You’ll launch and scale daily tests, safeguard account health, and collaborate closely with our CEO, creative, and operations teams to hit revenue and efficiency targets.



What You’ll Do

- Plan, build, and launch campaigns in
 Ads Manager daily (audiences, budgets, placements, tracking).

- Manage and pace budgets against KPIs; reallocate spend toward winners in real time.

- QA all assets and flows pre-launch (ad copy/creatives, URLs, pixels, events, landing pages, checkout).

- Moderate ad comments (hide/delete/reply as appropriate) to protect brand and conversion.

- Monitor account health, policy compliance, and limits; escalate risks early.

- Maintain clear performance reporting in Google Sheets; summarize insights and next steps.

- Partner with the CEO, video editor, and EA; attend a weekly stand-up with concise updates.

- Proactively propose tests (creatives, angles, audiences, funnels) and process improvements.

- Stable account health and policy compliance.



What You Bring

- Minimum IQ of 120

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- 2+ years hands-on media buying for E-commerce on
/Meta (dropshipping experience is a plus).

- Strong performance marketing mindset: comfortable with hypotheses, rapid testing, and data-driven decisions.

- Advanced Ads Manager skills; working knowledge of Events Manager, pixels/API, ad account, audiences, and attribution.

- High attention to detail; excellent written English; organized and deadline-reliable.

- Ownership mentality—able to work independently, surface risks, and take initiative without micromanagement.

- Comfortable with Google Sheets (lookups, pivots, basic charting) and structured reporting.

- Note on assessments: We value analytical thinking. Short skills/aptitude tasks may be part of our selection process.



How We Work (and What You’ll Get)

- Part-time with flexible hours, results-oriented culture; path to full-time for top performers.

- Compensation: $5/hour to start + performance bonuses.

- Approved expense reimbursement.

- Merit-based raises as your impact grows.

- Access to proven SOP's, fast feedback loops, and direct collaboration with leadership.

- Real growth opportunities: broaden into creative strategy  or team management as we scale.



How to Apply

- Put your favorite animal in the subject line/title—this helps us spot detail-oriented applicants.

Please include:

- Your CV/Resume.

- Links or screenshots of recent e-commerce campaigns you’ve managed (redact sensitive data).

- A short paragraph on why you’re the best fit, including your typical testing framework (budget per test, iteration cadence, success/fail criteria).

- Your availability (hours per week) 

- Your IQ in your account (you can do this for free on onlinejobs)



No AI-generated applications—we read closely and can tell.



We’re excited to meet driven marketers who want to grow with us and take real ownership. If that sounds like you, let’s talk.

To achieve this, we need a high-performing Appointment Setter who can consistently generate qualified calls.



The Role

Your job:

- Engage inbound + outbound leads

- Book high-quality calls for Funding Advisors



This is not a basic call center role.



You are responsible for:

- Booking qualified appointments that show up

- Setting the tone for a high-level client experience



Responsibilities

- Call, text, and follow up with leads

- Ensure high show rates

KPIs

- Calls made daily

- Appointments booked

- Show rate (%)

This is a performance-driven role.



Who This Is For

Who This Is NOT For

High performers can scale income significantly.



How to Apply

Answer:

- Full-time availability?

- Greatest strength?

title: Estimator / Engineer with Onsite Experience
description:
Company Overview

We’re a small group of big thinkers working together like a well-oiled machine.

We much rather work with a few exceptional individuals than a lot of average people.

A little bit our company,

We’re based in Sydney NSW

We started in 2022

We specialise in Remedial Construction which is fixing and improving existing buildings that have problems or need updates.

It includes a wide range of activities to keep buildings safe, strong, and looking good.

1. Waterproofing

2. Concrete repairs

3. Masonry repairs

4. Facade restoration

Job Summary

The Estimating Virtual Assistant plays a crucial support role within our pre-construction team, ensuring efficient and organized estimation processes.

This position is instrumental in managing administrative tasks, organizing project documentation, and supporting the Estimator and Pre-Construction Manager with detailed preparation for upcoming projects.

The role demands a high level of organization, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

• Meeting Coordination: Schedule and coordinate virtual meetings, including pre-construction meetings, bid discussions, and project debriefs, ensuring all necessary participants are informed and prepared.

• Deadline Management: Monitor and record project deadlines, providing timely reminders to the team to ensure that submissions and responses are prepared well in advance.

• Job Folder Organization: Set up and maintain digital job folders, ensuring that all project-related documents are accurately filed and easily accessible.

• Document Preparation and Control: Assist in compiling construction markups and preparing bills of quantities, ensuring accuracy and compliance with project requirements.

• Contractor Procurement and Management: Source new contractors, evaluate their qualifications, and maintain an up-to-date contractor list, facilitating effective bid processes and project execution.

• Administrative Support: Provide comprehensive administrative support to the estimating team, including, drafting correspondence, and any other tasks that contribute to the efficiency of the estimating process.

• Follow-Up and Feedback: Organize and manage the collection of feedback from clients and internal tea
mbers post-project completion to identify areas for improvement and celebrate successes.

• Communication: Act as a point of contact for internal and external queries related to estimation projects, ensuring clear and prompt communication.

• Data Management and Analysis: Organize and manage project data, including historical cost data, for easy access and analysis. This can help in making more accurate future estimates.

• Market Research: Conduct online research to stay updated on market trends, material costs, and the availability of subcontractors, which can influence project estimates and bids.

• Monthly Tender Reporting: Support the creation of tender reports related to projects, such as status, total amount of projects tendered, dollar value etc.



Skills and Qualifications

• Skills

o Technical Proficiency: Strong computer skills and proficiency in Plan Swift, MS Office, especially Excel, and familiarity with construction management software.

o Organizational Skills: Exceptional organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

o Attention to Detail: Meticulous attention to detail, ensuring accuracy in all aspects of work.

o Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

o Proactivity and Initiative: Ability to work independently, take initiative, and proactively address potential issues before they arise.

• Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in civil engineering, Architecture, or Quantity Surveying

• Experience:

o Experience has a quantity surveyor is preferred.

o Experience in reading and understanding drawings and technical specifications.

Work Environment

• The Estimating Virtual Assistant will operate in a dynamic, fast-paced office setting within our pre-construction department.

• Collaboration with the Estimator and Pre-Construction Manager are key components of the role.

• The position may require occasional site visits and participation in project meetings.

• This position is fully remote, providing the flexibility to work from home.

• The Estimating Virtual Assistant will be part of a supportive virtual team, with regular online meetings and communication channels to stay connected and aligned with the team's goals and projects.

Employment Type, Compensation, and Benefits

• Employment Type: Full-Time

• Compensation: TBC on Candidate

• Benefits:

o Professional Development: Opportunities for professional growth including training sessions, workshops, and seminars.

Application Process To apply for the Estimator position, please follow the steps outlined below:

1. Prepare Your Application: Compile your resume, cover letter, and any relevant certifications or portfolios that showcase your experience and skills related to construction estimation.



2. Submit Your Application:
 your application materials to 
 Please include "Estimating VA Application" in the subject line to ensure proper routing.

• Resume / CV

• Qualifications

• Academic Transcript

• Past Projects with Photos – If any

• References

• English Test Results which can be completed here: 
/english-test/

• Typing Test Results which can be completed here: 
/



3. Review Process: Our recruitment team will review applications on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted for an initial screening interview.



4. Interviews: Selected candidates will be invited to participate in one or more interviews. This may include interviews with the Pre-Construction Manager and other key tea
mbers, potentially including practical assessments or case studies relevant to the role.



5. Decision and Offer: Final candidates will be selected based on their interviews and reference checks. An offer will be extended to the chosen candidate, including a detailed overview of the compensation package and benefits.



6. Onboarding: Upon acceptance, the new Estimator will undergo a comprehensive onboarding process to become acquainted with our team, processes, and projects.



We appreciate your interest in joining our team and look forward to reviewing your application. For any inquiries regarding the application process or the position, please
 us at

title: Website Designer (HTML/CSS + Catholic Content | Detail-Oriented)
description:
Remote (Philippines) | Long-Term

!! Read carefully. Incomplete applications are ignored. !!



We build and manage websites for Catholic churches.



We are hiring someone who can:

• Design clean, structured layouts

• Write solid HTML and CSS (no guessing)

• Handle detailed content work with precision



This role is design + structured content + detail work.

If you rush or miss small things, this will not be a fit.



What You’ll Do

• Build and update pages using HTML/CSS

• Design clean, consistent layouts

• Enter and format parish content (Mass times, events, ministries)

• Maintain spacing, alignment, and consistency across sites





Requirements

• Strong HTML & CSS (Flexbox + Grid)

• High attention to detail

• Can work inside an existing system without breaking things

• Must understand basic Catholic structure (Mass, Sacraments, parish life)



Do NOT Apply If

• You rely on AI or templates to do the work

• You struggle with spacing, alignment, or responsiveness

• You rush through repetitive tasks and miss details

• You don’t understand Catholic terminology



Apply (Required)

Include ALL of the following:

3. Work Samples:

    2 links to sites you built (no templates)

4. Start your message with:

    “I pay attention to details.”



Final

We expect you to work efficiently.

But never at the cost of clean, consistent, accurate work.



If that’s you, apply.

title: Digital Marketer (Healthcare/Homecare)
description:
Company Summary



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in the U.S. We believe in true partnership where our virtual assistants act as an extension of the care team. Our goal is to ensure a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for clients and families alike. 



Job Summary



We are seeking a Digital Marketer that drives brand awareness, website, traffic and sales leads by designing and executing online strategies across social media, SEO/SEM,
, and display advertising. Key responsibilities include analyzing campaign performance metrics, managing advertising budgets, creating content, and optimizing ROI. The digital marketer will use the existing materials and should have a background with healthcare or homecare.



Key Responsibilities

Campaign Management : Planning and implementing paid campaigns on social media (
, LinkedIn, etc.) and Google Ads.

SEO/SEM Optimization : Conducting keyword research, on-page optimization, and SEO strategies to increase organic search rankings.

Content Strategy : Developing engaging content for websites, blogs, and social media platforms.

Analytics & Reporting : Using Google Analytics and other tools to measure traffic, evaluate KPIs, and report on campaign ROI.

 Marketing : Creating and managing
 campaigns to nurture leads and retain customers.

Social Media Engagement : Managing daily social media postings, monitoring engagement, and building community.

Market Research : Analyzing competitor advertising and identifying new market trends.





Required Qualifications

Technical Skills : Proficient in SEO/SEM, Google Analytics, content management systems (CMS) like WordPress, and
 marketing software.

Creativity : Ability to create engaging, consistent and on-brand content.

Data Analysis : Strong ability to analyze web statistics and translate them into actionable insights.

Communication : Excellent written and verbal communication skills for content creation and reporting.

Education/Experience : Typically a degree in Marketing, Communications, or relevant work experience in digital marketing roles.

Photo and Video Editing Skills : Proficient on any tools for photo and video editing.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us

Competitive Base Pay: We offer the highest base pay in the home care industry! 

Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best care possible. 

Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for advancement and learning. 

Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration, compassion, and a good laugh. 



Ready to Be a Hero? 



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated, have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s make a difference together.

title: Sales Coordinator - Join the 'Disney' of Short-Stays
description:
The Role

-------------------------



Most hospitality businesses sell rooms.



We’re building something entirely different.



A new category of experiential hospitality, where spaces aren’t just stayed in, they’re felt. Where each environment is designed to transport people into a different world. Where the line between property, story, and experience disappears.



The ambition is simple to say, but extremely difficult to execute:



To build the next global hospitality brand, one that people don’t just use, but remember.



Something closer to what The Walt Disney Company achieved with experience…

not what traditional operators have done with accommodation.



We are early enough that every hire matters.

But serious enough that standards are already high.



We are looking for a Growth & Acquisitions Coordinator who operates like an owner, not an employee.



Someone who:



1. Takes full responsibility for outcomes

2. Thinks independently

3. Executes relentlessly

4. And treats the pipeline like it’s their own business



Your role is simple to describe, but very hard to execute:



Nothing slips. Nothing stalls. No opportunity dies due to inaction.



If you read this and felt something, there’s a reason.





What You Will Own

---------------------
. The Pipeline — End to End

Every lead is tracked, progressed, and followed up, without exception

You know exactly where every deal sits at all times

You move deals forward proactively, not reactively

You revive cold leads and re-engage them intelligently

You identify high-value opportunities early

If a deal goes quiet, you already have a plan.



2. Follow-Up as a Discipline

You don’t “check in”, you follow up with intent

You understand timing, context, and psychology

You know when to push, when to pause, and how to re-open conversations

You build structured follow-up systems across:

Daily actions

Weekly touchpoints

Long-term reactivation



3. Communication That Moves People

Every message you send has a purpose

Your writing is sharp, human, and considered

You adapt tone based on the person and situation

You can move someone from hesitation ? action through communication alone



Important:

You are not dependent on AI to think or write for you.



You may use tools, but:

You understand every word you send

You think before you write

You don’t produce generic, templated output



4. CRM & System Ownership

CRM is always clean, structured, and current

Every interaction, note, and next step is logged properly

You create visibility across the pipeline

You build systems that make follow-up inevitable, not optional



5. Lead Nurturing & Reactivation

You identify when leads are going cold before they disappear

You re-engage them with context-aware, intelligent outreach

You create reasons for people to respond

You think in timelines, not one-off messages



6. Opportunity Sourcing

You actively look for new opportunities across:

Listings

Communities

Platforms

Networks

You don’t wait for leads, you help generate them

You surface high-quality opportunities with clear reasoning



7. Execution Standard

You don’t drop balls

You don’t need reminders

You don’t wait for direction

You think ahead and act early

You operate with a level of ownership most people don’t.





What We’re Looking For

------------------------------------

Fluent, natural English (written & spoken)

Exceptional written communication, this is critical

Proven ability to manage pipelines, follow-ups, or deal flow

High attention to detail

Strong internal standards, you care about doing things properly

Comfortable speaking with clients, agents, and prospects

Structured, proactive, and highly organized





Who This Is NOT For

--------------------------------

People “learning” sales or coordination

People who wait for instructions

People who rely entirely on AI to produce their work

People who let leads go cold

People who send generic, low-effort messages



If you’ve ever said “I forgot to follow up”, this role is not for you.



What This Actually Is

----------------------------------

This is not a job where you complete tasks.



This is a role where you:



Take ownership of a core function of the business

Operate as if outcomes sit on your shoulders

Become a critical part of something being built at scale



We are building something ambitious.



And the people who join early…

are the ones who shape what it becomes.



Application Instructions (Do Not Skip)



To apply, submit:



1. Your CV / Resume

2. A 2–3 minute video answering the following:

- Tell us about a time you owned a pipeline or process, how did you ensure nothing slipped?

- Walk us through your exact system for tracking and managing follow-ups

- A warm lead hasn’t replied in 10 days, what do you do next? Be specific

- What does it mean to you to operate “like an owner” in a role like this?

- If someone was to tell you, you were going to join the Disney of the short-stay industry, how would that make you feel?

title: Short term Rental VA Manager
description:
Senior Virtual Assistant – Short-Term Rental (STR) Specialist



We are a fast-growing short-term rental management company seeking an experienced Senior Virtual Assistant with proven experience in the STR industry.

• Canva

)

title: US Payroll Virtual Assistant
description:

Required Skills

Ideal Candidate

title: Insurance VA
description:

Location: Remote | Schedule: 8 am to 5 pm US timezone



About Us

We are a U.S.-based insurance agency dedicated to simplifying insurance for individuals and businesses. Our team provides support across multiple lines of coverage, including Property & Casualty, Auto, Homeowners, and Business Insurance. We value proactive service, clear communication, and efficient processes to deliver a seamless client experience.

ntum AMS preferred; experience with Applied Epic, AMS360, Hawksoft, EzLynx, AgencyZoom, or similar systems is a plus), Microsoft Office, and Google Workspace

title: Industrial Designer/Engineer - Hard & Soft Goods
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a talented and experienced Product Designer to join our design team. This role will focus on developing both hard goods (kitchenware, home décor, tableware, storage solutions) and soft goods (textiles, bedding, table linens, home accessories) for our seasonal product lines. The ideal candidate is proficient in Adobe Creative Suite, has strong textile and print design skills, and understands the product development process from concept through production.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design & Development:

• Create original designs for hard and soft goods across multiple home product categories

• Develop patterns, prints, and textile designs using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Design seasonal collections that align with market trends and brand direction

• Produce technical sketches, renderings, and detailed specifications for manufacturing

• Create colorways and maintain brand color standards across product lines

• Develop presentation boards and line sheets using Adobe InDesign

Product Development & Production:

• Manage products from initial concept through final production

• Create comprehensive technical specification packages including materials, construction details, and finishes

• Collaborate with overseas vendors and factories to ensure design integrity

• Review and approve prototypes, samples, and pre-production units

• Provide feedback and revisions to manufacturing partners

• Support quality control processes and address production issues

• Assist with cost analysis and value engineering when needed

Collaboration & Communication:

• Work cross-functionally with merchandising, sourcing, and sales teams

• Present design concepts and seasonal line reviews to internal stakeholders

• Research market trends, competitive products, and consumer preferences

• Attend trade shows and markets as needed

• Maintain organized design files, asset libraries, and documentation

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience:

• 3-7 years of professional product design experience in hard and soft goods

• Proven track record designing home products, textiles, or related categories

• Experience working with overseas vendors and understanding of manufacturing processes

• Portfolio demonstrating strong design skills across multiple product categories

Technical Skills:

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign

• Strong understanding of textile and print design

• Ability to create camera-ready artwork and production files

• Knowledge of pattern development and repeats

• Technical specification writing experience

Design Capabilities:

• Strong understanding of color theory and trend forecasting

• Excellent visual communication and presentation skills

• Ability to translate concepts into commercially viable products

• Understanding of materials including ceramics, glass, metal, wood, textiles, and finishes

• Knowledge of manufacturing processes for both hard and soft goods

Professional Skills:

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities

• Strong time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Problem-solving mindset with focus on practical solutions

• Adaptable to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

• Self-motivated with ability to work independently and as part of a team

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree in Product Design, Textile Design, Industrial Design, or related field

• Experience in the wholesale/import industry

• Knowledge of product safety standards and compliance requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects or Premiere

• Experience with CAD software

• Familiarity with retail market and consumer trends

• Trade show and market experience

title: Recruiter Expert Review High Volume US Candidate Resumes
description:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and proactive Resume Screener and also a Resume Screening Manager to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for reviewing and evaluating incoming resumes for a variety of job positions. Your primary task will be to qualify or disqualify candidates based on their prior experience, answers to questions, location, and skill sets that align with employers' needs. This position requires someone with strong attention to detail, a keen eye for spotting key qualifications, and the ability to work efficiently in a very high-volume, fast-paced environment.

• Evaluate candidates based on their experience, answers to questions, location, and relevant skills

• Consistently maintain a high level of accuracy in identifying qualified applicants.

• Collaborate with hiring teams to ensure alignment between job requirements and candidate profiles.

• Manage a high volume of resumes while ensuring quality and consistency in evaluations.



Requirements:

**CANDIDATE NEEDS TO BE 100% FLUENT IN SPEAKING, READING AND WRITING ENGLISH**

• Strong attention to detail and ability to spot key qualifications quickly.

• Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage a high volume of resumes.

• Ability to work efficiently and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal.

• Previous experience in resume screening or recruitment in the US is a MUST

• Able to work 6 days per week during EST/eastern standard time hours

• Proficiency in Job Websites such as ZipRecruiter, Indeed, etc.



Why Join Us:

• Competitive compensation.- LONG TERM PROJECT

• Opportunity to work in a fast-paced, high-energy environment.

• Collaborative team culture with opportunities for growth and development.



If you are passionate about helping match top talent with the right opportunities and thrive in a fast-moving environment, we encourage you to apply for the Resume Reviewer position today!



Weekly payments made via PayPal

title: Facebook Ads Specialist (Amazon & Shopify Focus)
description:
We are looking for a high-level
 Ads Specialist who 
’t just "run ads," but understands the intricate plumbing of cross-platform attribution. If you know how to navigate the "black box" of Amazon traffic and bridge the gap between Meta and Marketplace sales, we want to talk to you.



Your primary mission will be to drive high-intent traffic to our Amazon listings and Shopify store while ensuring we capture as much data as possible for retargeting and optimization.



Key Responsibilities

Full-Funnel Meta Management: Strategy, setup, and scaling of
/Instagram ad campaigns focused on ROAS and conversion.



The "Amazon Connection": Utilize Amazon Attribution to track off-Amazon traffic and bridge the data gap.



Pixel & API Integration: Implement and manage the Meta Pixel and Conversions API (CAPI) on Shopify, and use tools (like Attribution tags or specialized landing pages) to simulate "pixel" tracking for Amazon sales.



A/B Testing: Constantly iterate on creative, copy, and landing page environments to lower CAC.



Reporting: Provide weekly insights on spend, attributed sales, and organic ranking lift on Amazon.



What We’re Looking For

Proven Amazon-to-Meta Experience: You understand the nuances of driving external traffic to Amazon (landing pages vs. direct-to-listing) and how it affects the "A9" ranking algorithm.



Shopify Mastery: Deep knowledge of the Shopify-Meta ecosystem, including catalog syncs and Advantage+ campaigns.



Technical Savvy: You know how to set up tracking in a post-iOS14 world. You should be familiar with creating "super URLs" or using intermediate landing pages to capture data before the user hits Amazon.



Results-Oriented: You speak in terms of ROAS, MER (Marketing Efficiency Ratio), and TACOS, not just "clicks" and "likes."



Requirements

2+ years of dedicated experience managing Meta Ads for E-commerce brands.

Demonstrated success in managing monthly budgets of $10k+.

Expertise in Amazon Attribution and the Amazon Brand Registry ecosystem.

Ability to craft compelling ad copy and provide creative direction for high-converting visuals.



How to Apply

If you have the skills to scale our brand across both Shopify and Amazon, please follow the instructions below carefully:



Send your applications  to  
 Line: FB Ads Specialist - [Your Full Name]

 attachment: 

Cover Letter, Resume, Portfolio (case studies preferred), and a brief Video Introduction.





Note: Any applications submitted through other platforms will not be entertained. Please
 the address above directly to be considered for the role.

title: Tax Manager
description:
Job Title: Tax Manager



Position Overview

We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Tax Manager to lead tax planning, tax preparation oversight, and client advisory services for business owners and high-income individuals. This role is ideal for someone who is technically strong, client-facing, and passionate about helping clients make smarter financial decisions year-round, not just at tax time.



The Tax Manager will be responsible for managing client relationships, reviewing tax returns, identifying tax-saving opportunities, and helping ensure a high level of service across the firm. The ideal candidate is organized, strategic, and able to communicate tax concepts clearly and confidently.



Key Responsibilities

Manage a portfolio of business and individual tax clients



Review complex federal and state tax returns for individuals, partnerships, S corporations, and corporations



Lead proactive tax planning engagements and identify strategies to reduce client tax liability



Meet with clients to discuss tax projections, planning opportunities, and financial decisions



Provide guidance on entity structure, reasonable compensation, retirement planning, deductions, and other strategic tax matters



Serve as a trusted advisor and main point of contact for assigned clients



Collaborate with bookkeeping, payroll, and administrative tea
mbers to ensure accurate and timely deliverables



Monitor tax law changes and communicate relevant updates to clients and internal tea
mbers



Assist in improving internal processes, workflows, and client experience



Train, mentor, and support junior staff as needed



Help manage deadlines during tax season and throughout the year



Qualifications

CPA license required



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field required



Master’s in Accounting or Taxation preferred



5+ years of public accounting or relevant tax experience preferred



Strong knowledge of individual, business, and entity taxation



Experience with tax planning and advisory work, not just tax preparation



Ability to review returns efficiently and accurately



Strong verbal and written communication skills



Comfortable meeting directly with clients and explaining tax matters in plain English



Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through



Experience with tax software, bookkeeping platforms, and practice management systems preferred



Preferred Traits

Strategic thinker who looks for solutions, not just compliance answers



Client-focused and relationship-driven



Confident communicator with a professional presence



Able to manage multiple deadlines and priorities



Takes ownership and works well independently



Enjoys helping clients grow and make informed financial decisions

title: Customer Success & Documentation Specialist (SaaS Contractor – Philippines, Remote)
description:
If you enjoy turning complex software workflows into clear, structured guidance — and helping customers succeed through documentation, systems thinking, and AI-ready knowledge design — this role is for you.



Contract Type: Independent Contractor

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Monthly Contractor Fee: ?120,000–?140,000 depending on experience



A bit about Brilliant Assessments



Brilliant Assessments is a powerful self-service assessment platform that enables business experts to build sophisticated interactive assessments that generate screen dashboards or PDF reports delivering high-value insights to respondents.



You can explore the platform here:



 ? click “Take the Brilliant Assessment”



We started in New Zealand and now work globally with customers across the United States, the United Kingdom, Europe, and beyond. We are a lean, high-performing team where every tea
mber has real influence.



About the role



This is a fully remote independent contractor role based in the Philippines, working closely with customers and tea
mbers across:

- the United States

- Europe

- New Zealand



The role initially focuses heavily on documentation, SOP development, and knowledge-base improvement, helping us scale Customer Success through automation and AI-enabled support.

Over time, the role expands into direct customer support, onboarding, and solution design.



Availability expectations



Contractors are expected to maintain strong working-hour overlap with UK and US business hours.

Typically this means availability approximately between: 7:00 PM – 4:00 AM Philippine time

Exact working hours are flexible and managed by the contractor, provided customer support coverage expectations and collaboration needs are met.



What you’ll focus on first



Your initial priority will be helping us strengthen our documentation and SOP library so customers — and AI tools — can independently solve common workflows and questions.



This includes:

- creating and improving Customer Success SOPs

- improving Zendesk knowledge base content

- simplifying complex workflows into structured guidance

- identifying repeat support questions suitable for automation

- helping design AI-ready support documentation

- improving onboarding clarity for assessment builders

- supporting the development of templates and reusable resources



This role plays an important part in helping Brilliant Assessments scale Customer Success through automation and structured documentation.



How the role will grow



As documentation foundations strengthen, responsibilities expand into:

- supporting customers via

- delivering Zoom onboarding sessions

- helping customers design and optimise assessments

- assisting with customer assessment builds when needed

- contributing to onboarding improvements

- helping develop templates and example solutions

- supporting customer case-study development



This is a high-impact role with real influence on how Customer Success evolves inside the company.



A bit about you



We value attitude, structured thinking, and clarity of communication above everything else.



You are likely a strong fit if you:

- have experience supporting SaaS customers

- have experience working inside Zendesk (or similar platforms)

- enjoy creating structured documentation and SOPs

- are comfortable working with AI tools

- have exceptional written English

- have strong analytical problem-solving skills

- can simplify complex workflows clearly

- have excellent attention to detail

- are confident working independently in a remote environment

- are comfortable communicating on Zoom

- are proficient with Microsoft Word

- have an eye for layout and presentation quality

- enjoy improving systems, not just responding to tickets



Bonus strengths:

- knowledge-base design experience

- onboarding or implementation experience

- technical support experience

- instructional writing experience

- process improvement experience

- workflow automation curiosity



Contract structure



This role is offered as an independent contractor engagement.

Contractors:

- work remotely from their own location

- provide their own equipment and internet connection

- manage their own working schedule within agreed availability expectations

- invoice monthly

- manage their own taxes and statutory obligations in their country of residence



What we offer



- Monthly contractor fee of ?120,000–?140,000 depending on experience

- Fully remote role

- Long-term engagement with a global SaaS company

- Opportunity to shape how Customer Success scales through AI

- Direct impact on product usability and customer experience

- Close collaboration with a high-performing international team

- Low-bureaucracy working environment



Application questions



Please include responses to the following:

- Why do you believe you are an exceptional fit for this role?

- Tell us about yourself and the type of work you enjoy most.



Practical assessment (part of the application process)



Shortlisted candidates will complete a short practical assessment designed to evaluate:

- structured problem-solving ability

- attention to detail

- written communication clarity

- documentation structure skills

- ability to simplify complex workflows

- customer-focused thinking

- process improvement mindset

- ability to prepare AI-ready support documentation



The assessment typically takes approximately 30–40 minutes to complete.



If you enjoy building systems that genuinely help customers succeed—and want to be part of a thoughtful, high-performing global team shaping the future of AI-enabled customer success—we’d love to hear from you.

title: Senior QBO e-Commerce Bookkeeper – RECON Focus| up to PHP45K | Remote | Morning Schedule | with Time Doctor
description:
About the Role



We are an Australian-based e-commerce business looking for a bookkeeper who can take full ownership of our books.



This is not a maintenance role.



You will be responsible for reviewing and reconciling 12–24 months of historical data, identifying discrepancies, and bringing the books to a clean, accurate state — then maintaining them moving forward.



If you are used to clean, easy books, this role is not for you.



If you are confident working through complex reconciliations where things don’t match, you will do well here.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Initial Focus

1. Review and reconcile 12–24 months of accounts

2. Identify discrepancies and fix issues

3. Ensure all records are accurate and properly structured



Ongoing Work

Daily: Post invoices and bills in QuickBooks Online

Weekly: Reconcile key accounts, assist with payroll

Monthly: Full reconciliation, review P&L, check accuracy

Quarterly: Assist with BAS and GST checks



What We’re Looking For:

1. Strong experience with QuickBooks Online

2. e-Commerce bookkeeping experience (WooCommerce, WordPress, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay, etc.)

3. Experience handling full reconciliations independently

4. Comfortable working with messy or incomplete records

5. Basic understanding (or willingness to learn) Australian accounting (BAS, GST, payroll)

6. Strong attention to detail and ownership mindset

7. Looking for a long-term role, not short-term work



Important (Please Read Before Applying)



This role involves:

1. Cleaning up backlog

2. Fixing discrepancies

3. Working through accounts that don’t immediately match



We are specifically looking for someone who:

1. Can investigate and solve problems independently

2. Does not give up when reconciling gets difficult

3. Wants to stay and improve the system long-term



Work Setup (Remote)

Full-time (40 hours/week)

title: Full-Time Chrome Extension Developer for eCommerce Automation SaaS
description:
I run Dropanion, an eCommerce automation software business focused on online marketplace selling.



The software helps automate a retail-to-marketplace workflow. In simple terms, we take products from retail supplier sites such as Amazon and list them onto online marketplaces such as eBay. Right now the main workflow is Amazon to eBay, but we are looking to expand to more suppliers and more marketplaces over time.



Our software automates several major parts of this business, including:

• auto listing products

• finding winning products

• tracking inventory and stock status

• helping automate order fulfillment workflows

• managing accounting-related data such as profit sheets and tracking



The product has two main parts:

1. a backend website where users sign up, manage billing, and access their account

2. a Chrome extension that handles much of the browser automation and workflow execution



I already have a developer helping with some backend work, but I am now looking for a full-time developer who can take a major role on the Chrome extension side of the product while also being comfortable with the backend-connected parts that tie into it.



I want someone who can help build, debug, improve, and eventually take strong ownership over the extension side of the business.



What You'll Be Working On

Your main focus will be the Dropanion Chrome extension, including:

• building new features

• fixing bugs and reliability issues

• maintaining browser automation workflows

• improving scraping and data extraction logic

• adding new supplier integrations

• helping expand to additional marketplaces

• connecting extension workflows with backend systems

• helping turn product ideas into working product features quickly



Tech Stack / Experience Needed

This role is primarily focused on the Chrome extension and browser automation side of the product that includes web scraping and bot like activity, but it also touches backend-connected workflows.

You should be comfortable with a mix of:

• JavaScript

• Chrome extension development

• browser automation

• web scraping

• DOM interaction

• API integrations

• Firebase / Firestore

• backend-connected workflows

• AI/API-based product logic



For example, the extension may trigger workflows that store listing data in Firestore, send data to backend endpoints, or make AI-related API calls. Because of that, I need someone who is strong on the extension/front-end automation side and competent enough with backend integrations to work across the full feature flow when needed.



You do not need to be a pure backend engineer, but you should be comfortable understanding and working with backend-connected product logic.



AI-Assisted Coding Is Required

I specifically want a developer who is comfortable using modern AI coding tools such as:

• Cursor

• Claude Code

• other strong AI-assisted coding tools

I am not looking for someone who codes everything manually in the slow traditional way.

You should know how to use AI tools to:

• build faster

• debug faster

• understand existing code faster

• ship features more efficiently

At the same time, I want someone who can still think critically, review code properly, and not rely blindly on AI.

What I'm Looking For



You are a strong fit if you:

• have real experience building or maintaining Chrome extensions

• are strong with JavaScript

• have worked with scraping, browser automation, or dynamic front-end workflows

• can debug issues when websites change

• are comfortable working across both front-end extension logic and backend-connected workflows when needed

• understand how browser-based tools interact with databases, APIs, and backend services

• can understand product workflows, not just isolated code tasks

• are fluent in English and can communicate clearly in English in both written and verbal settings

• can work independently

• are comfortable moving quickly and shipping real product improvements

• want a long-term role inside a growing software business

Bonus If You Have Experience With

• eCommerce software

• marketplace integrations

• automation bots

• Firebase

• Firestore

• Stripe

• GPT or other AI API integrations

• product scraping

• browser workflows involving sites like eBay, Amazon, or similar platforms



How to Apply

When applying, please include:

1. your experience with Chrome extensions

2. your experience with web scraping or browser automation

3. your experience with Firebase / Firestore / APIs if any

4. the AI coding tools you use

5. 1-3 relevant projects you have worked on

7. your availability

8. the word Dropanion at the top of your application so I know you read the full post



This is a full-time role with long-term potential for the right person.

title: Rockstar Social Media Manager Wanted
description:

nts. Now we're ready to grow our online presence and drive real traffic to our website.



We're looking for a creative, strategic Social Media Manager who can build and run our brand's social presence from the ground up, producing content that stops the scroll, grows our audience, and drives people to our website. This isn't just a posting role. We want someone who understands what makes content perform, thinks in stories, and knows how to use AI tools to work smarter and produce more.



There's also a strong video ad component to this role. The content you create for organic social will feed directly into our
 and Instagram ad campaigns, so an understanding of what makes paid content convert is a real asset.

- Plan, create, and publish engaging content across
 and Instagram (and TikTok as the brand grows)

nts, and campaign goals

nts

Ad Creative Support

- 
 organic content into
 and Instagram ad creatives

Community & Growth

- Stay current on social media trends, platform updates, and what's working in the celebration/gifting niche



What We're Looking For

 and Instagram, with awareness of what performs in paid placements
