title: Senior Concert & Live Event Research Specialist
description:
Senior Concert & Live Event Research Specialist (Data-Driven Ticket Analysis)



****ONLY APPLY IF EXPERIENCED, MINOR TRAINING WILL BE DONE, IF YOU ARENT EXPERIENCED IT WILL BE EASILY OBVIOUS****





I am seeking a highly experienced research professional to support strategic concert ticket purchasing decisions through thorough, multi-source analysis and clear data visualization. This role requires someone who can independently gather, verify, and synthesize information from multiple reputable websites and databases, then present findings in an organized, decision-ready format using charts, graphs, and structured reports.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, analytical, and experienced in producing professional-quality research that is easy to understand and actionable.



**Core Responsibilities:**



* Conduct comprehensive research on upcoming concerts, tours, and live events across multiple platforms and sources

* Analyze ticket availability, historical pricing trends, demand patterns, and timing strategies

* Cross-reference data from different websites to ensure accuracy and completeness

* Monitor presale dates, public sale launches, and inventory changes

* Identify optimal purchasing windows based on data and market behavior

* Produce clear visual reports using charts, graphs, and dashboards to make insights easy to interpret

* Provide concise recommendations supported by evidence and data

* Maintain organized records of research and historical event data



**Research Expectations:**



* Use multiple reliable sources (ticketing platforms, resale marketplaces, venue sites, event listings, and industry data tools)

* Validate information across sources rather than relying on a single website

* Demonstrate strong judgment in evaluating data quality and reliability

* Deliver structured, professional-grade research suitable for decision-making



**Required Experience & Skills:**



* Experience with Jancy not necessary but preferred

* Experience with Automatic

* Proven experience conducting advanced research and data analysis

* Strong ability to synthesize large amounts of information into clear conclusions

* Proficiency creating charts, graphs, and visual summaries (Excel, Google Sheets, Tableau, Power BI, or similar tools)

* Excellent organizational and documentation skills

* High attention to detail and accuracy

* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

* Strong written communication skills



**Preferred Qualifications:**



* Experience analyzing ticket markets, events, entertainment, or live music industries

* Familiarity with ticket pricing behavior and demand trends

* Experience tracking time-sensitive releases or high-demand inventory

* Background in data analysis, market research, or operations research



**Work Structure:**



* Remote position

* Project-based with potential for ongoing or long-term collaboration

* Flexible schedule, with availability during critical ticket release periods



**Performance Indicators:**



* Accuracy and reliability of research

* Clarity and usefulness of visual reports

* Speed and responsiveness during time-sensitive situations

* Quality of insights and recommendations



**How to Apply:**

Please provide:



1. A summary of your relevant research and analysis experience

2. Examples of reports, charts, or dashboards you have created (If any)

3. Tools and software you are proficient in

4. Your typical turnaround time for research projects

mber

title: Remote Opportunity - Charter Operations Assistant
description:
We’re hiring a highly organized, detail-driven professional to support luxury yacht charter operations. You’ll manage proposals, itineraries, logistics, and client requests—ensuring every charter runs smoothly from inquiry to completion.



Working closely with the Charter Broker, you’ll operate side-by-side with management, handling execution behind each deal - keeping timelines on track, coordinating with crews and partners, and delivering a seamless, high-touch client experience.



Ideal for someone who:

• Has experience in luxury travel, hospitality, or operations 

• Has supported management or worked closely with leadership 

• Thrives in fast-paced, detail-heavy environments 

• Takes ownership and follows through without supervision 

• Communicates clearly and professionally



About Us:



At CKIM Group Inc., the way we serve our clients and partners is guided by a clear set of values and a commitment to excellence in every experience we design.



Our Values

Excellence • Service • Partnership • Proactive Assistance • Kaizen (Continuous Improvement)



These principles guide how we collaborate, anticipate needs, and consistently elevate the level of service we provide.



Our Brand Promise – LEAD

Listen — We listen carefully to understand each client’s vision and preferences.

Excellence — We pursue the highest standards in every detail.

title: Senior Healthcare Nurse Recruiter  (Resume & Experience Required)
description:
Job Title: Nurse Recruiter with Administrative Healthcare Experience



Employer: HomeLogic Healthcare



Job Description:



You must have previous Healthcare Recruitment Experience for recruiting registered nurses.



DO NOT APPPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE 1-2 YEARS EXPERIENCE OR PLAN TO WORK AN ADDITIONAL JOB FROM 9am EST - 4pm EST



HomeLogic Healthcare, a leading pediatric home care agency, is seeking an experienced Nurse Recruiter with strong background in administrative healthcare tasks, particularly in requesting and obtaining medical records and documentation. The ideal candidate will play a crucial role in facilitating communication with healthcare providers, assisting in the recruitment of qualified nurses, and supporting the overall administrative operations of our agency. A Bachelor's degree is required for this position. Due to the nature of this work, we will not consider candidates with another job during the hours of 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM EST.



Key Responsibilities:



Medical Records and Documentation:



Request, obtain, and organize client medical records and documentation from hospitals, medical clinics, and other healthcare providers.

Communicate with healthcare professionals via phone and
 to ensure timely and accurate receipt of necessary records and documentation.

Ensure all records are handled in compliance with HIPAA regulations, maintaining confidentiality at all times.

Nurse Recruitment and Staffing:



Assist in attracting and recruiting qualified nurses for pediatric home care positions.

Screen, interview, and coordinate with prospective nursing candidates to match them with the specific needs of our pediatric clients.

Maintain an active database of nursing candidates and manage their credentials.

Collaborate with the staffing team to ensure that staffing requirements are met promptly and effectively.

Administrative Duties:



General administrative tasks, including organizing, filing, and managing medical records and other related documentation.

Create and manage spreadsheets to track and monitor client information, staffing data, and other important metrics.

Coordinate schedules, appointments, and meetings for internal staff, clients, and healthcare providers.







Required:

A Bachelor's degree is required. (Nursing Preferred)

Previous experience in administrative healthcare settings, especially in requesting and obtaining medical records.

Excellent phone skills and the ability to communicate effectively and professionally with hospitals, medical clinics, and healthcare providers.

Strong organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, etc.) and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets).

Preferred:

Nursing experience (or healthcare background) is highly preferred but not required.

Previous experience in healthcare staffing recruitment is a plus.

Experience with social media management and marketing is an asset.

Basic graphic design skills (using tools like Canva or Adobe Suite) are a plus.

Skills and Attributes:



Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in managing sensitive information.

Proactive, self-motivated, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.

Ability to adapt and learn quickly in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

Strong sense of confidentiality and professionalism when dealing with sensitive client and patient information.



Work Hours and Environment:



Due to the nature of this position, candidates with another job during these hours will not be considered. The role requires access to a computer, reliable internet, and a quiet, dedicated workspace.



Application Process:

To apply, please submit the following:



Resume outlining your relevant experience, particularly in healthcare administration and recruitment.

title: Remote AI Automation Specialist
description:
Overview

We are looking for an AI Automation Specialist to help us apply modern AI tools to improve how our business

operates. This is a hands-on role focused on turning real-world workflows into AI-assisted systems—reducing

manual work, improving consistency, and helping our team move faster.



This is not a traditional developer role and it is not a strategy role. It is a building role—for someone who has made

AI a core part of how they already work, and who is ready to apply that to a real business with real problems to

solve. We currently use Claude Co-Work and expect it to be part of the toolkit, but we’re open to the right person

bringing their own tool judgment and approach.



We are a commercial flooring installation company. The problems you’ll work on are practical: faster lead

response, smarter estimates, better job costing, and automations that make our sales and operations teams more

effective.





Work Schedule

-Full-Time – 40 hours per week

-Monday–Friday

-8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

-1 hour lunch break

-Must align fully with U.S. Central Time business hours

-Remote (Philippines and Latin America candidates only)





Employment Structure

-Independent Contractor





Compensation

-$1000-$1500 USD/month.





Benefits & Perks

-15 days of Paid Time Off

-Local and U.S. Holidays





Equipment Requirements

-Reliable high-speed internet

-Dedicated home office workspace





What you’ll do

-Work directly with team members to understand how work gets done across sales, estimating, and operations

-Turn messy, manual processes into structured, repeatable systems—such as automating lead follow-up and proposal drafting for a field sales team

-Build outputs like lead responses, proposal drafts, follow-up sequences, and job summaries

-Connect tools and platforms so information flows automatically between systems

-Continuously test and improve—introducing new automations on a regular cadence



This is an ongoing role. The expectation is regular, visible progress—not a one-time build.





What you need



Required

-1+ years of daily, hands-on AI use in a professional context—AI must already be central to how you work, not an occasional tool

-Familiarity with Claude Co-Work or similar AI workspace environments

-Strong systems thinking—able to take an ambiguous, real-world process and make it structured and repeatable

-Comfort experimenting without a clear roadmap and iterating quickly based on results

-Clear communication skills—you will work closely with non-technical teammates



Helpful but not required

-Experience with workflow automation platforms such as Zapier, Make, or n8n

-Familiarity with tools like Airtable, HubSpot, Notion, or Google Workspace

-Background working in field service, construction, or trades





What success looks like

-Lead response time drops and the sales team spends less time on manual follow-up

-Proposals and estimates are generated faster and more consistently

-Key workflows run reliably without requiring constant human intervention

-The team is empowered to maintain and extend automations independently

-New improvements ship on a regular, visible cadence

title: Remote Takeoff Estimator/Quality Control Rep-Work From Home
description:
We are currently looking to add to our growing team. We are a USA-based takeoff & estimating service company. This position is for remote in-house estimators/Quality Control Reps. Please read the job details and respond accordingly to our questions to be considered. Thank you!



We are looking for:



Position 1: Structural Estimators like wood/Lumber package, steel framing, and metal framing

Position 2: Architectural Estimator like Finishes-Drywall, Painting, Flooring, etc

Position 3: Civil Estimator

Position:4 MEP Estimator







Job Details-You will be performing takeoffs and some quality control tasks



1. Part-time to Full-time work available and even over time-based on Performance & Quality Of Work-We can offer stable consistent work to the right person (Full Time Prefered)

2. Some training is provided

3. Must have 5+ Years of experience

4. Must have an engineering or architectural degree or equal estimator experience

5. Must Speak English

title: GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant
description:
We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support daily operations inside a fast-growing digital business.



This is NOT a basic VA role.

We are building systems, content, and digital products — and we need someone who can execute, think, and grow with the company.



???? REQUIREMENT (IMPORTANT)



You MUST have experience working inside GoHighLevel (GHL)



This includes:



Creating and editing funnels (landing pages, sales pages, checkout pages)

Building workflows and automations

Using tags, triggers, and campaigns

Uploading and organizing courses/products

Creating forms and connecting systems

Basic troubleshooting inside GHL



If you have never worked inside GHL, this position is not a good fit.



???? RESPONSIBILITIES



GoHighLevel (Primary Focus)



Build and update funnels

Set up workflows and automations

Upload courses/products into the system

Connect forms, tags, and triggers

Test and ensure everything flows correctly



Content Support



Schedule and post content (TikTok and other platforms)

Repurpose content using provided tools/generators

Assist with captions and formatting



Admin Tasks



Organize digital files and assets

Assist with product setup and launches

Follow structured systems and checklists

Complete assigned tasks efficiently and on time

???? IDEAL CANDIDATE



You are:



Organized and detail-oriented

A fast learner who follows instructions well

Proactive (you take initiative without waiting)

Comfortable working with digital tools and systems

Able to communicate clearly and consistently



Bonus if you:



Have experience with digital products or online businesses

Understand content marketing or social media

Have worked with CRM or funnel-building platforms

???? TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS



Internet Requirements:



Minimum 25 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload

Higher speeds (50+ Mbps) strongly preferred

Stable and reliable connection (no frequent disconnections)



Backup Plan (REQUIRED):



Backup internet option (mobile hotspot, pocket WiFi, etc.)

Backup power plan if outages are common (power bank, generator, or alternate workspace)

?? IMPORTANT



This role requires consistency and reliability.

If your internet or power is unstable without backup options, this may not be a good fit.



? HOURS & GROWTH

Part-time: 4 hours per day

This role will transition into a full-time position after a successful probation period

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

???? HOW TO APPLY



Follow ALL steps below to be considered:



1. Start your application with:

READY TO BUILD



2. Process Question:

If I asked you to build a simple funnel in GoHighLevel for a free download, what steps would you take from start to finish?



(Be detailed — we are evaluating your thinking.)



3. Scenario Question:

A lead submits a form but does NOT receive the
. What are 3 things you would check inside GoHighLevel?



4. Experience:



Have you worked inside GoHighLevel? If yes, what have you done?

If not, what similar platforms have you used?



5. Technical Info:



Your internet speed

Your backup internet plan

Your backup power plan



Applications that do not follow instructions will NOT be considered.



???? FINAL NOTE



We are building something long-term.



This is more than just a job — this is an opportunity to grow with a structured, fast-moving digital business focused on execution and results.



If you are dependable, skilled, and ready to build — we want to hear from you.

title: Partner Onboarding Specialist
description:
About the Role

We're hiring a Partner Onboarding Specialist to guide new partners through our onboarding program. After a prospect applies, you'll be the person who walks them through getting set up in our system — handling everything from initial calls and contracts to technical setup of their accounts. This is a hands-on role that blends customer support, technical setup, and relationship management.

You'll work directly with partners over phone, text,
, and screen-share sessions. Some partners are tech-savvy, many are not — your job is to make the process feel smooth either way.

What You'll Do



Conduct outbound and inbound calls with prospects and newly approved partners

- Walk partners through a detailed onboarding checklist over screen-share, often guiding them step-by-step through their device

- Set up and configure new partner accounts, including
 setup, two-factor authentication, and account security configuration

- Generate and send contracts to partners

- Troubleshoot technical issues in real time as they come up during onboarding

- Maintain accurate records in our internal documentation system for every partner profile

- Follow up with partners via SMS and
 on an ongoing communication schedule (5–7 days post-onboarding and beyond)

- Build and maintain prospecting lists as needed

- Other onboarding and partner-success tasks as assigned



Requirements (all required)

- Clear, professional English communication — both verbal (for calls) and written (for texts and
s)

- Strong customer service skills — patient, friendly, and able to keep partners calm and confident through technical steps they don't fully understand

- Tech-savvy — comfortable navigating browser settings, mobile OS settings (both iOS and Android),
 configuration, two-factor authentication, QR codes, and remote-access tools. You don't need to be a developer, but you should be the kind of person friends and family call when their tech breaks

- Problem solver — every onboarding has unexpected curveballs. You need to think on your feet and figure things out without getting stuck

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to follow a multi-step checklist exactly without skipping steps

- Available to take and make calls during US business hours

- Available for on-call coverage when necessary — partner onboardings and follow-ups don't always happen on a perfect 9-to-5 schedule, so flexibility to handle occasional calls or issues outside standard hours is required

- Discretion and trustworthiness — you'll be handling partner account credentials and sensitive information



Preference 

- Experience with AI tools and systems — we're looking for someone who actively uses AI in their workflow (ChatGPT, Claude, automation tools, etc.) and ideally has experience building or setting up AI-powered workflows, automations, or systems. If you're the type of person who uses AI to work smarter and faster — not just someone who's heard of it — that's a major plus

- Prior experience with customer onboarding, technical support, or virtual assistant work

- Experience with screen-share-based remote support

- Background supporting US-based clients

title: YouTube Video Editor for Coaching Channel
description:
I run a YouTube channel focused on mindset coaching and helping mid-career professionals get clarity and build online businesses. I need a skilled part-time video editor who can make my content look and feel like it came from a premium brand.



What you will be doing:

Editing raw talking head and screenshare footage between 8 and 20 minutes, removing filler words, long pauses, and mistakes, adding text overlays, transitions, and visual elements that improve pacing and hold attention, creating polished YouTube thumbnails using Photoshop, Adobe Premiere, or Canva, and delivering upload-ready files with a 48 hour turnaround.



What I am looking for:

Proven experience editing YouTube content including both talking head and screenshare formats, proficiency in Adobe Premiere, Photoshop, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve or similar, a strong eye for pacing and storytelling, reliable communication and turnaround, and a portfolio or samples of previous YouTube editing work.



Please include examples of videos or thumbnails you have edited when you apply. Applications without samples will not be considered.



I publish one to two videos per week. This starts part time with real potential to grow as the channel grows.

title: Short-Form Video Editor + Social Media VA (High Volume – TikTok / IG / FB)
description:
???? About the Role:

I’m a high-volume content creator generating over $700,000 in GMV through TikTok Shop, and I’m looking for a fast, reliable Video Editor + VA to help me scale.

?? This is a high-output role.

We produce 70+ short-form videos per week, and I need someone who can keep up with speed, consistency, and quality.

I will provide all raw footage — your job is to turn it into multiple high-performing videos and post them.

???? Your Responsibilities:

?? Video Editing (Primary Focus)

Turn raw clips into 3–5 different videos per clip

Add hooks, captions, and clean cuts

Create fast-paced, engaging short-form videos (TikTok/Reels style)

Deliver content daily

???? Posting + Social Media Support

Post videos to:

TikTok

Instagram (Reels + Stories)


Write captions + hashtags

Add affiliate links (Amazon + Mavely)

Ensure links are placed correctly (bio, captions, etc.)

???? What I’m Looking For:

FAST editor (speed matters more than perfection)

Experience with TikTok / Reels-style content

Understands hooks, pacing, and retention

Can create multiple variations from one clip

Organized and consistent

Good English communication

? This is NOT for you if:

You take a long time editing one video

You only know how to make one version of a video

You need constant direction for every step

???? Bonus If You:

Have worked with creators or affiliates before

Understand basic affiliate marketing (Amazon, Mavely, etc.)

Can follow trends and simple content styles

title: Social Media Virtual Assistant (Content Posting + Lead Support)
description: We are a boxing, strength, and conditioning business focused on helping driven adults build confidence, get in shape, and learn real boxing skills. We are growing quickly and looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to support our content and lead flow.

title: Youtube long- form content & editing Assistant
description: We’re seeking a creative, detail-oriented assistant to support our long-form YouTube content. You’ll edit extended videos, focusing on storytelling flow and audience engagement. Collaborate on research, structure topics, and create captivating thumbnails. You’ll manage deadlines and our content calendar, ensuring timely delivery. Initially, this will be a gig role—successful collaboration may lead to a full-time position! Previous experience in long-form video production is essential.

title: A.I video creator
description:
You will be creating AI-generated images and videos using tools like Veo3 and editing them with capcut.



You will be trained on everything through our full in-house training course. Previous experience with AI image and video generation is required. You'll make 3 videos per day, and work Monday to Saturday 5-6 hours/day.



You will be rewarded generously with bonuses when videos go viral. I have over 2,000,000+ followers so good quality videos go viral regularly.



REQUIREMENTS



• Previous experience generating AI images and AI videos

• Previous experience with Veo3

• Can work Monday to Saturday, 5–6 hours/day 

• Strong English

• Strong internet connection

• Good eye for quality

• Able to take direction and constructive feedback

• Able to receive payments through Wise



HOW TO APPLY



Record ONE video answering all the questions below. Upload it along with one AI video you've previously made to a Google Drive folder and submit the link to me in your application. 



If you do not submit a video of yourself answering these questions and submit one previously made A.I video your application will NOT be reviewed.



APPLICATION QUESTIONS:



1. Tell us about yourself.

2. Are you in school or currently working? 

3. If not working — why did you leave or get let go from your last position?

4. Can you commit to Monday–Saturday, 5–6 hours/day?

5. What AI tools have you used and what kind of videos have you made?

6. Walk us through how you created an A.I video before.

title: Multimedia Specialist
description:
The ideal candidate will:

*Show competency in videography principles from scripting through final editing and show proficiency with branding guidelines using Adobe CS and video motion software such as Premier Pro, Motion, and/or After Effects, Premiere and Final Cut Pro in an Apple Mac environment.

*Pre-visualize and/or storyboard shot ideas based on scripts or project outlines.

*Perform non-linear editing using Final Cut or Adobe Premiere software and designs after effects as needed including motion graphics, layout, and animation

*Be able to select and use music to match the tone and style of the episode and story

*Be able to create various types of audio / video to tell stories across multiple platforms

*Be able to mix different media into a complete experience (video, graphics, music).

*Experience in typography, color, composition, compositing, key framing, and title design.

*Be detail-oriented and possess a sophisticated editing style

*Knowledge of social media and how to engage audiences on digital platforms in the public space is essential to this role

*Ability to work with a team directly in edit sessions to assess needs and meet project requirements.

*Properly maintain a digital archive

*Possess a strong attention to detail and time managements skills, and be an organized team player

*Have experience working in a fast-paced environment on weekly deadlines

*Demonstrate a solid typing WPM (ideally 45 wpm+)

*provide their own video and audio equipment



Job responsibilities include:

*Advise and coach the team on lighting, audio and video requirements to ensure quality footage for use in post-production

*Manage our podcast production schedule for Rosie Radio, including managing workflow; and capture, editing, and uploading of podcasts to various online channels (iTunes [Libsyn], YouTube, blog, etc)

*Play a highly collaborative creative role in structuring new ideas and managing production projects to completion

*Edit online content for YouTube and 
, including podcast episodes, storytelling videos, and how-to videos

*Create and produce marketing videos and PR videos, as needed

*Sourcing photos, stock video and audio as needed for projects

*Create all multimedia content for social (audio / video / design)

*Edit and upload footage and maintain video logs and media storage

*Create motion graphics for video

*Design online / social graphics for various projects



Qualifications

*Well-versed in Adobe Premiere, along with the rest of Adobe CC software (After Effects, Photoshop, etc)

*Experience creating media for social and the web

*Experience in storytelling via videography

*Knowledge of video codecs and encoding software

*Expertise with multicam editing

*A strong understanding of editing workflows and file structuring

*Ability to color correct and mix audio

*Knowledge and experience with video lighting and basic set setup



Tech Requirements:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Need to have professional editing software (Licensed Adobe Premiere)



Work core hours are from Sunday - Thursday 7:30 PM - 11:30PM CST // Monday - Friday 8:30AM - 12:30PM PH Time



This is a PROJECT-BASED role with a salary range of PHP28,000 -38,000 monthly,  



Application Instruction:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagnnlBbUosheImMK/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Video editor Premiere Pro, Full-time
description:
We’re looking for an additional full-time video editor to join our team.



The editing work is intermediate, not requiring any After Effects etc., but extensive PP experience is needed to meet our required editing speed and output.

Your editing time will also include finding matching footage and not only editing.



Requirements:



- Extensive experience with Premiere Pro, fast editor

- Willing to follow exact instructions/SOPs

- Enjoy editing fictional stories/discoveries

- Daily/weekly output targets must be met

- 40h+ per week available

(40h+ per week availability is an absolute must because the video production involves multiple tea
mbers who rely on each other, and we want to ensure stability for everyone)



Full-time salary:



First month: 700usd

After first month: 800usd ($5/h)

(Any subscriptions needed like stock footage will be provided, you won’t have any expenses)



Salary listed above is for full-time, 160h/month.



Hubstaff time tracker + NDA required.

Please only apply if you want to work long-term on this over several months.



Include in your proposal:



- Some of your past editing work (only work that YOU edited and with Premiere)

- What editing software you use + which plugins

- Your exact PC specs

- A short description of what your most recent job was (summarize it in 1-4 sentences what you worked on)



To confirm you read this entire listing, put in your proposal subject the word “FOCUS”

title: Sales Support Assistant – CRM and Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Looking for a stable, structured role where accuracy and consistency matter?



Kalibrate-Ed is seeking a detail-oriented, dependable professional to support our Sales operations in a part-time remote role. If you take pride in staying organised, maintaining clean data, and helping systems run efficiently, this could be the right role for you.



Why You’ll Enjoy Working with Us

• Structured Work:?Clear expectations, defined processes, and reliable routines.

• Direct Mentorship:?Learn from senior leaders who value precision and proactive problem-solving.

• Supportive Culture:?Work with a team that values calm, consistency, and collaboration.



What You’ll Do

You’ll play a key part in supporting our Sales operations through data accuracy, systems management, and proactive follow-up.



• Keep CRM data accurate and up to date.

• Manage contact lists and campaign registrations.

• Support lead generation and outreach activities.

• Track metrics and report daily activity numbers in Excel and Work Management System.

• Support continuous improvement by documenting Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) related to outcomes.



Who We’re Looking For

You’ll be a good fit if you:



• Have excellent attention to detail and follow-through.

• Enjoy structured, predictable work and get satisfaction from completing tasks accurately.

• Are self-motivated, reliable, and consistent with communication.

• Feel comfortable learning new systems and working with data.

• Prefer clear guidelines and measurable outcomes.



Requirements

• At least 3 years of experience in CRM data management and Sales Support admin functions.

• Competent in Microsoft Office 365 (Outlook, Excel for reporting), and CRM systems.

• Experience with Go HighLevel (GHL) is highly regarded. 

• Stable internet connection and reliable remote setup.

• Quiet professional, remote work environment



What We Offer

• Part-time role with potential to transition to full-time permanent role.

• Work Flexibility:?Independent contractor, ongoing monthly project-based, fully remote



HOW TO APPLY

Please send your CV and responses to the questions below to 
 What systems or tools have you used for CRM or data management and how do you ensure accuracy and consistency in your work?

2. Describe how you stay organised and manage recurring tasks.

3. How do you handle situations when priorities change unexpectedly?

4. What motivates you to stay focused in a routine or structured role?

5. If you were asked to pull lead conversion data from multiple systems (e.g. CRM, spreadsheets, and campaign trackers), what steps would you take to reconcile and present the results clearly?



Kindly also include answers to the following Screening Questions within your application:

• Do you have minimum 3+ years of experience in a similar role or a proven track record in CRM, database management, or lead generation?

• Do you have a laptop with at least an Intel i5 processor (i7 preferred) and fully licensed versions of Microsoft Office desktop apps?

• Do you have a fast internet (above 100mbps), VPN set to Sydney, dual screens, back-up power, and a quiet professional work set up?

• Are you available to work as a contractor in a remote role with flexible hours?



Only complete applications will be reviewed.



Due to expected volume, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Bookkeeper (QuickBooks | AU Clients)
description:
We seek a detailed Accounting professional with Australian-client experience to work within precise rules and procedures to maintain very high standards of accuracy within a growing business environment.



ABOUT THE ROLE

Kalibrate-Ed is a growing, education strategy organisation working with Australian clients, contractors, and partners. We’re looking for a Bookkeeper who can meticulously manage day-to-day financial operations to keep our numbers accurate and up-to-date.



This is a flexible, remote role with permanent ongoing work in a friendly team environment with clear deadlines and steady outcomes.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

• Work within precise rules and procedures to maintain very high standards of accuracy within a team environment.

• Keep the company’s financial books and transactions organised, up-to-date and compliant.

• Actively identify and report variances, errors and anomalies in financial figures.

• Process accounts receivable, including client income arrangements and payment verification.

• Correctly categorise and process expense transactions, including correct tax codes and ABR verifications.

• Actively manage clear financial deadlines and prepare end-of-month reconciliation and ATO submissions – including IAS, BAS and STP.

• Analyse financial data and create leadership reports and forecasting.

• Create and manage compliance with company’s financial policies and SOP.



YOU MUST HAVE:

• Qualifications as an accountant (CPA, CA) working with QuickBooks

• Minimum 3+ years of demonstrable experience in accounting in a remote contractor role

• Experience working with Australian clients within their local taxation and payroll systems

• Expertise in QuickBooks with proficiency in MSOffice 365



YOU WILL POSSESS:

• Professional with expertise in accounting and finance. This role is not suited to a general VA.

• Clear communication skills to coordinate activity and resolve discrepancies with internal and external stakeholders.

• Meticulous attention to detail - able to spot mistakes easily.

• Proactive organise for deadlines with the flexibility Adapt and Respond – to time-sensitive ad-hoc items as they arise and effectively reorganise to hit deadlines.



WORKING ARRANGEMENTS

• Paid on a fixed monthly, project-based fee

• This is a flexible work arrangement; however, there may be urgent items such as New Client payment set up or ad-hoc tasks to resolve finance issues, you are expected to actively monitor communication during AU business hours and prioritise accordingly.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Expert knowledge of QuickBooks; strong working knowledge of Microsoft 365 Suite (Teams, Excel, Outlook, SharePoint).

• Home-based, quiet and professional workspace.

• High-speed internet (>100mbps) with power with connectivity and power back-up.

• PC laptop (i5 or higher), with dual screens and headset preferred.



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered for this role,
 your complete application package to 



• Your CV – detailing your QuickBooks and AU experience, please also include two contactable references.

• Cover letter with:



a. Short summary of your experience.

b. Responses to these questions:



• Please state 3-5 Australian-taxation specific requirements or processes you’ve been responsible for.

• Please outline the steps or stages you’d take to ensure accurate and on-time submission of BAS in Australia?

• What specific tasks do you expect to be doing day-to-day?

• What do you expect will be the biggest challenge in the role?

• What is your process for ensuring meticulous accuracy of all financial numbers?



Kindly also include answers to the following Screening Questions within your application:

• Do you have 3+ years' experience using QuickBooks?

• Do you have experience working with Australian clients?

• Do you have experience preparing BAS or IAS in the Australian Taxation system?

• Do you understand what it means to work as an independent contractor or freelancer with ongoing work (as opposed to an employee)?

• Do you have a licensed MS Office desktop app installed?

• Are you a qualified accountant (CPA, CA)? Please state your qualifications.

title: Gaming YouTube Editor — Bertii (67K Views/Month, Scaling Fast)
description:
About the Role:

Looking for a part-time video editor who lives and breathes gaming content. You'll be editing Marathon (Bungie extraction shooter) gameplay and commentary into polished long-form YouTube videos, cutting Shorts, and helping scale Bertii — a fast-growing gaming channel currently at 841 subs with 67K views in the last 28 days, racing to 10K subs.

What You'll Be Doing:



Editing 5-8 minute Marathon commentary/analysis videos from raw webcam footage + gameplay B-roll + voiceover

Cutting 30-45 second Shorts from long-form content and standalone clips

Adding text overlays (max 3 words, bold white/yellow/red), zoom-ins on key lines, cinematic transitions, and SFX timed to voiceover

Syncing Marathon gameplay footage under commentary with smart cutaways (no talking head 10+ seconds without break)

Layering royalty-free background music that shifts mood per section (excitement ? worry ? hype ? unease)

Building retention-first pacing — every edit must serve a purpose, not variety for variety's sake

Following detailed editor briefs provided per video (audio notes, visual direction, Shorts to cut)

Delivering final exports ready to upload



Brand Style You'll Be Working In:



Colors: Red, teal/cyan, black

Captions: Max 3 words per caption, animate in (never pop-in)

Transitions: Whoosh on scene changes, risers before key 
nts, hits on reveals

Pacing: No dead air, cuts keep the eye in the same screen spot, graphics animate in

Tone: Fast, direct, high-energy — matches the talent's on-camera style



Requirements:



Experience editing gaming YouTube content (send samples — bonus if FPS, extraction, or Destiny/Bungie content)

Proficiency in CapCut (primary) or Premiere / DaVinci Resolve

Strong understanding of YouTube retention mechanics — hooks, retention loops, curiosity resets, Shorts pacing

Fast turnaround — 24-48 hour delivery from receiving raw footage + brief

Reliable communication and consistent delivery (this role is built on deadlines)

Strong English communication



Nice to Have:



Active Marathon player or extraction shooter knowledge

Thumbnail design experience (Pikzels, Photoshop, or similar)

Understanding of YouTube Shorts strategy and algorithm signals

Familiarity with OpusClip for Shorts workflow

You actually watch gaming YouTube and can reference creators like Penguinz0, Asmongold, Bellular News, etc.



Compensation & Structure:



Pay per video (rate based on experience — send your rate with samples)

Starting at 2-3 long-forms per week + associated Shorts cutdowns

Opportunity to scale with the channel as it grows



How to Apply:



Portfolio of 2-3 gaming edits

Your CapCut/Premiere proficiency level

Your rate per long-form + rate per Short

Quick note on why you want to work on Marathon content specifically

title: Executive Operations Assistant | Founder’s Right Hand | High-Level Remote Operator
description:
I’m looking for a high-level Executive Operations Assistant to work directly with me as my right hand.



This is not a typical assistant role. You will act as a second brain  someone who can take direction at a high level, break it down, and execute without constant oversight.



I run multiple businesses across design, real estate, and media. Things move fast. I need someone who can keep up, stay organized, and make decisions when needed.



If you are someone who enjoys figuring things out, building systems, and taking ownership  this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

Managing day-to-day operations across multiple business areas

Taking high-level ideas and turning them into clear execution plans

Handling communications 
, vendors, tea
mbers, clients)

Organizing and prioritizing tasks across projects

Building and improving systems, workflows, and processes

Following up relentlessly to ensure things get done

Researching, problem-solving, and presenting solutions (not just questions)

Assisting with hiring, onboarding, and team coordination

Managing timelines, deliverables, and accountability across people

Helping me stay focused by filtering noise and handling what doesn’t require me

Who This Is For

You are highly organized and naturally proactive

You do not wait for instructions — you anticipate needs

You are comfortable making decisions with limited information

You can communicate clearly and professionally

You are detail-oriented but also understand the bigger picture

You are resourceful — you can figure things out without being told how

You take ownership and treat the business like it’s yours

You are calm under pressure and can handle multiple moving parts

Who This Is NOT For

Someone who needs constant direction or step-by-step instructions

Someone who only wants to complete assigned tasks

Someone who avoids responsibility or decision-making

Someone who struggles with communication or follow-through

Required Skills & Experience

Strong written and verbal English communication

Proven experience supporting executives or managing operations

Project management experience (ClickUp, Asana, Notion, etc.)

Ability to manage multiple priorities at once

Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills

High level of professionalism and discretion

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience with real estate, design, or content/media businesses

Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, CRM systems

Experience hiring or managing remote teams

Work Setup

Remote (Full-Time Preferred)

Must be available for regular communication and fast response times

Long-term role with growth potential

How to Apply



To apply, please include:



A short introduction about yourself

A description of a time you were given a vague task and how you handled it

What systems/tools you’ve used to manage operations or projects

Why you believe you can operate as a “second brain” for a founder



Start your application with the phrase: “Ready to Operate” so I know you read this fully.



Final Note



I’m looking for someone who wants to grow into a true operator — not just an assistant.

If you’re the type of person who takes ownership and figures things out, this can turn into a long-term, high-level role.

title: Sales Closer + Admin– Cleaning Company
description:
We're a growing residential and commercial cleaning company looking for a sharp, reliable VA who can do two things really well: close inbound leads and keep our operations running smoothly. What you'll do:

, and text — and close them into booked appointments

* Handle client complaints professionally and work to retain accounts

* Are comfortable on the phone - clear English, calm under pressure, great listener

* Have experience with scheduling tools, CRMs, or booking software

* Are self-driven and don't need micromanaging to hit your tasks

* Have a reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace



Pay:

Schedule:

To Apply:



* Do you have experience using Launch 27, BookingKoala, or similar booking and scheduling platforms?

* Are you comfortable speaking on the phone while accurately capturing details in real time?

* Send a 1-2 min voice intro

title: Remote Medical Order & Renewal Specialist
description:
Remote Medical Order & Renewal Specialist

Location: Remote, Philippines

Job Type: Full-Time

Team Size: 3 (you'll be one of 3)

Job Type: Sales and Customer Support



Schedule

This role follows a rotating schedule, including weekend shifts, to help provide customer coverage 7 days per week.

Shift options may include:

6:00 AM to 12:00 PM Pacific Time

11:30 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Time

3:00 PM to 9:00 PM Pacific Time

Tea
mbers will rotate shifts and weekend coverage based on business needs.



Job Description

We are hiring a full-time Remote Medical Order & Renewal Specialist to help manage inbound customer inquiries and move customers from inquiry to completed order or renewal.

This role is primarily handled through text-based communication in GoHighLevel (GHL) and supports customers who are ordering, renewing, or continuing treatment within a medical workflow.

You will be responsible for answering pricing questions, confirming a customer’s current dose, matching them to the appropriate next dose in their approved titration schedule, creating orders in our internal platform, and pushing completed orders to pharmacy processing.

This role requires someone who is organized, responsive, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a healthcare-adjacent environment involving medication-related workflows.

TimeProof time tracking required.



Main Responsibilities

Respond to inbound customer inquiries, mainly by text

Answer pricing questions clearly and accurately

Confirm a customer’s current medication dose

Match customers to the correct next dose in their titration schedule based on approved internal workflow

Process orders and renewals accurately

Create customer orders in our Medusa platform

Push completed orders to pharmacy processing

Follow up with customers when information is missing

Keep customer records accurate and organized

Help support medication-related administrative workflows

Escalate clinical or medically sensitive questions to the appropriate licensed or internal tea
mber

Assist with customer follow-up and incomplete orders when inquiry volume is lighter

Help with other operational tasks as assigned

Use GoHighLevel (GHL) as the primary communication platform for managing customer conversations, follow-up, and workflow activity



Schedule and Coverage Expectations

This role is part of a rotating team schedule designed to provide customer coverage throughout the week, including weekends.

Applicants must be comfortable with:

rotating shifts

weekend work

a schedule that may change based on coverage needs

working as part of a team handoff system



Requirements

Strong written English

Strong attention to detail

Comfortable communicating with customers by text throughout the day

Able to manage multiple conversations without losing accuracy

Organized, dependable, and responsive

Reliable computer and internet connection

Able to work assigned shifts consistently

Willing to take on additional tasks as the business grows

Able to follow instructions and stay productive throughout the workday

Comfortable working within structured processes involving medication dosing, titration steps, and order handling

Able to recognize when a question should be escalated rather than answered directly



Preferred Experience

Customer service

Order entry

Patient intake

Healthcare support

Telehealth, pharmacy, or e-commerce support

Experience supporting customers in medication-related or treatment-related workflows

How Performance Will Be Measured

Number of inquiries handled

Number of completed orders processed

Accuracy of work

Response speed

Reliability and consistency

Ability to stay organized and follow the workflow correctly

Proper escalation of clinical or sensitive issues



Additional Note

We are looking for someone who wants a serious, long-term role and is comfortable being part of a team-based coverage schedule that includes weekends. This role supports customers in a medical treatment workflow, so accuracy, professionalism, and good judgment are essential.



TO APPLY, Fill out our application here:

title: Paid Ads Creative Specialist
description:
We're looking for a high-output Paid Ads Creative Specialist to join our team and help us scale performance creative on Meta. This is a fast-paced production role — you'll be cranking out 50+ ad creatives per month across static and video formats, testing hooks, angles, and concepts to find what converts.



You know what stops the scroll. You understand the Meta creative ecosystem and can move quickly without sacrificing quality. You're equally comfortable building a punchy static image ad as you are editing a UGC-style video or motion reel.



What you'll do



Produce 50+ ad creatives per month across static (feed, story, carousel) and video (Reels, short-form) formats for Meta campaigns

Translate briefs and winning concepts into scroll-stopping creative using strong copy hooks and visuals

Iterate rapidly on top-performing ads — resizing, refreshing hooks, and creating variations to combat ad fatigue



Stay on top of Meta ad trends, format changes, and what's working in the feed

Manage your own production queue and hit weekly output targets without hand-holding



What we're looking for

- 2–4 years of experience creating paid social ads, preferably for direct-to-consumer or e-commerce brands

- Strong proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere Pro (or CapCut / DaVinci Resolve)

- Solid understanding of Meta ad formats — feed, story, Reels, carousel, and collection ads

- Ability to write short-form ad copy: punchy hooks, CTAs, and body text that sells

- Comfortable working at high volume and managing multiple briefs simultaneously

- Eye for detail — consistent branding, clean layouts, and on-brand typography

- Experience reading basic ad performance metrics (CTR, hook rate, thumb-stop ratio) is a plus

- Reliable internet connection and available during core business hours



Nice to have



- Experience with UGC-style or lo-fi video editing that mimics organic content

- Familiarity with tools like Canva Pro, Figma, or Motion Array for templates and assets

- Previous experience working with a media buyer or performance marketing team

- Basic motion graphics or After Effects skills

title: Chief Operating Officer (COO)
description:
Chief Operating Officer (COO)

Location: Remote

Schedule Requirement: Must work on Pacific Time hours

Job Type: Full-Time



Job Description

We are looking for a highly capable, hands-on Chief Operating Officer (COO) to help organize, restructure, and strengthen the operational side of the business.

This role is focused on creating clarity and accountability across the company. The COO will work closely with the founder and existing team to understand how work is currently being done, map out existing processes, identify inefficiencies and breakdowns, streamline workflows, define clear roles and responsibilities, and implement practical KPI tracking across departments.

This is not a passive oversight role. We are looking for someone who can actively step into the business, gather information from tea
mbers, document and improve current processes, and help turn a growing company into a more organized, scalable, and measurable operation.

The right person must be comfortable working in Pacific Time, collaborating directly with the founder and existing staff, and driving execution across teams.



Main Responsibilities

Work directly with the founder to assess the current operational structure and identify gaps

Map out existing business processes across departments and functions

Meet with existing tea
mbers to collect information, understand responsibilities, and identify inefficiencies

Work with the founder to streamline workflows and improve how the business operates day to day

Restructure tasks and processes to improve clarity, speed, accountability, and execution

Define and document clear roles and responsibilities for tea
mbers and departments

Help redesign job functions where needed to better fit business needs

Create and implement KPI frameworks across teams and roles

Establish reporting structures and accountability systems

Identify bottlenecks, redundancies, and operational breakdowns, and recommend practical solutions

Improve internal coordination across departments

Help prioritize operational initiatives and ensure follow-through

Assist in building a more scalable operating structure as the business grows



What This Person Will Be Expected to Do

Map how the business currently operates

Identify what is unclear, inefficient, duplicated, or broken

Work with the founder to simplify and streamline processes

Turn unclear responsibilities into clearly defined ownership

Turn scattered tasks into repeatable workflows

Turn team activity into measurable performance

Create systems that make it easier to manage people, priorities, and results



Requirements

Strong operations background

Proven experience building, documenting, and improving workflows and processes

Experience mapping business processes and identifying operational gaps

Experience defining roles, responsibilities, and accountability systems

Experience creating KPIs and performance reporting across teams

Strong communication skills and ability to work with different personalities across a team

Able to gather information directly from tea
mbers and translate it into operational improvements

Comfortable stepping into an existing business and making structure out of ambiguity

Highly organized, practical, and execution-focused

Must be available to work on Pacific Time hours

Must be comfortable working closely with the founder and existing staff

Must be willing to use TimeProof timekeeping software as part of the role



Preferred Experience

Experience in founder-led businesses

Experience in fast-moving or operationally messy companies that need structure

Experience managing cross-functional teams

Experience in healthcare, telehealth, e-commerce, or service businesses is a plus

Experience implementing scorecards, SOPs, departmental KPIs, and reporting systems



How Performance Will Be Measured

Completion and quality of process mapping across the business

Improvement in workflow efficiency and accountability

Improvement in clarity of team roles and responsibilities

Creation and implementation of KPI systems across departments

Reduction in confusion, redundancy, and operational bottlenecks

Better visibility into team performance and business execution

Ability to create structure that the team actually follows



To Apply

Please send:

your resume

a short summary of your operations experience

examples of companies or teams you have helped organize or restructure

examples of processes, KPI systems, or accountability structures you have built

your availability in Pacific Time



Additional Note

We are looking for someone who is not just strategic, but also highly practical. This role requires someone who can work with the founder and team to map current processes, streamline operations, create accountability, and build a stronger operating system for the business. Use of TimeProof timekeeping software is required for this role.

title: Customer Service Superstar Wanted!
description:
Summary

Do you thrive on building meaningful relationships and bring unforgettable experiences to customers? Are you passionate about delivering outstanding service and excited to grow with a dynamic team? If this sounds like you, we’d love to have you on board!



About Us:

Started in 2006, Uniworld Omniport is a DTC e-commerce company that owns and operates two niche leading brands in poker BBO Poker Tables and board gaming Game Theory Tables. Headquartered at the Speedway in North East Las Vegas, the company’s global footprint brings together tea
mbers from around the world to align around our company goal - “To create unforgettable memories between friends and family”. Our internal team culture can be distilled down to the foundations of trust and accountability, and it shows in our tea
mber’s actions.



Why This Role Matters:

This isn’t just about talking to customers on phone, text and
s—it’s about creating memorable experiences, resolving problems efficiently, and enhancing every interaction with customers. You’ll play a crucial role in ensuring our brand lives up to its promise of excellence.





What Success in this Role looks like:

- Delivering Unforgettable Customer Experiences: You’ll be the first point of contact for our customers, providing support that is professional, empathetic, and solution-oriented. Your ability to understand their needs and guide them seamlessly through their journey will set you apart.

- Solving Problems Before They Arise: Exceptional service means being proactive. You’ll anticipate challenges, address concerns efficiently, and ensure every customer interaction ends with satisfaction.

- Driving Value with Upselling Opportunities: This isn’t about hard sales—it’s about understanding customer needs and identifying products or services that genuinely enhance their experience. Your recommendations will build trust and add value.

- Championing Continuous Improvement: Your role goes beyond customer interactions. You’ll bring fresh ideas, collaborate with the team, and refine processes to improve efficiency and elevate service standards. Your insights will help shape our operations.



What You’ll Deliver:

- Consistently high customer satisfaction scores.

- Improved internal processes based on your contributions.

- A collaborative spirit that makes the team stronger every day.



Why Join Us?

We’re more than a workplace—we’re a community that values growth, innovation, and collaboration.



Deliverables:

The Perfect Omotenashi Support We Need:

- Experience That Speaks for Itself: You’ve thrived in a customer service role, consistently delivering outstanding results. Experience in sales? That’s a big plus!

- Master Communicator: Your verbal and written communication skills are sharp, clear, and customer-focused. You know how to engage and leave a lasting impression.

- Problem-Solving Mastery: You’re a quick thinker who excels at finding solutions, even under pressure. Detail-oriented and solutions-focused, you tackle challenges head-on.

- Adaptability for Success: You’re comfortable working a graveyard shift and are ready to bring your A-game, no matter the hour.

- Proven Results: Your track record shows a history of exceeding customer expectations, improving processes, and driving success in every role you’ve taken on.

title: Master Scheduler & Logistics Associate
description:
Join Our Team as a Master Scheduler & Logistics Associate! 

At our core, we believe that a great product is only as good as the experience of receiving it. We 

are looking for an orchestrator—someone who can bridge the gap between production planning 

and final delivery to ensure our premium gaming tables reach our customers swiftly and with 

surgical precision.



About Us 

Founded  in  2006,  Uniworld  Omniport  is  a  direct-to-consumer  (DTC)  e-commerce  company  that 

owns  and  operates  two  industry-leading  brands:  BBO  Poker  Tables  and  Game  Theory  Tables. 

Based  at  the  Speedway  in  North  East  Las  Vegas,  our  global  presence  connects  team  members 

from  around  the  world,  united  by  our  mission  to  "create  unforgettable  memories  between  friends 

and  family."  At  the  core  of  our  internal  culture  are  trust  and  accountability,  values  that  are 

evident in the actions of our tea
mbers.



Why This Role Matters: 

You are the heartbeat of our operations. By owning the integration of production scheduling and 

freight booking, you directly impact our brand reputation. You ensure that every "BBO Poker 

Table" and "Game Theory Table" moves seamlessly from a build plan to a customer’s home, 

eliminating friction and boosting productivity across the entire organization. 



How Success is Measured in This Role: 

We believe in transparency and data-driven growth. Your success will be evaluated through: 

?  On-Time Performance:  Meeting or exceeding delivery service level agreement with the 

customer consistently. 

?  Accuracy Rates:  Ensuring fulfillment and booking accuracy are near-perfect. 

?  Cost Efficiency:  Identifying and securing optimal freight rates to balance quality and 

cost. 



The Perfect Teammate We Need: 

?  The Orchestrator:  You have a knack for creating master  schedules that account for 

inventory, staffing, and capacity constraints. 

?  The Communicator:  You can collaborate across departments—from  Sales and 

Customer Service to the local dispatch team—to keep everyone aligned. 

?  The Detail-Obsessive:  You take pride in the Quality Check process, validating every 

accessory, color, and customization to ensure order completeness. 

?  The Strategic Thinker:  You don't just follow a process;  you audit SOPs and update 

scheduling logic based on seasonal trends and business goals.



What You’ll Deliver: 

?  Daily Flow:  Update build lists, conduct shipping coordination meetings, and generate 

Bills of Lading (BOL). 

?  Logistics Mastery:  Secure freight bookings, track  orders proactively, and manage 

overflow needs with the Product Operations Manager. 

?  Strategic Planning:  Participate in quarterly KPI "Deep Dives" and contribute to annual 

production and logistics strategies. 

?  Visibility:  Provide real-time updates and shared production SLAs to ensure 

stakeholders always know where an order stands. 



Why Work With Us? 

You aren't just a gear in a machine; you are the one designing how the machine runs. You will 

have a seat at the table during strategic planning meetings, influence our shipping vendor 

partnerships, and play a pivotal role in the expansion of two premier gaming brands.

title: Video Editor/Graphic Designer
description:
Join Our Team as a Video Editor – Bring Stories to Life with Us!



Are you an expert in video editing with a passion for creating dynamic, impactful content? Do you have the skills to bring stories to life with your editing style, and are you looking for an opportunity to work in a fast-paced, creative environment? At Uniworld Omniport, we're on the hunt for a dynamic and driven Video Editor to join our growing team.



The ideal candidate is someone with a successful track record of building social content for a brand and has experience in successfully growing a brand’s social media presence. If you have a proven ability to craft compelling narratives through video and are up-to-date with the latest editing techniques, we’d love to hear from you!



About Us

Founded in 2006, Uniworld Omniport is a direct-to-consumer (DTC) e-commerce company that owns and operates two industry-leading brands: BBO Poker Tables and Game Theory Tables. Based at the Speedway in North East Las Vegas, our global presence connects tea
mbers from around the world, united by our mission to "create unforgettable memories between friends and family." At the core of our internal culture are trust and accountability, values that are evident in the actions of our tea
mbers.



Why This Role Matters:

This isn’t measured just by the quality of the content you create, but by the impact it has on our brand and audience. As a Video Editor at BBO Poker Tables and Game Theory Tables, you’ll contribute to the bigger picture—driving customer engagement, enhancing our brand image, and fostering team collaboration. You’ll be at the forefront of creating videos that not only capture attention but also deliver tangible results.



The Perfect Video Editor We Need:

- Expertise in Key Software: Highly proficient in Adobe After Effects and/or Adobe Premiere with a solid understanding of Adobe Photoshop.

- Content Creation Mastery: Proven ability to create dynamic, high-quality videos that resonate with audiences and align with our brand image.

- Engagement-Driven: Focused on achieving and maintaining high levels of engagement across all platforms—social media, websites, and more. You’ll help elevate our content performance to the next level.

- KPI-Oriented: You’re results-driven and have experience managing performance metrics, consistently meeting or exceeding KPIs related to content engagement, social media performance, and website traffic.

- Collaborative Spirit: Able to seamlessly work with various tea
mbers to deliver content that aligns with a unified brand message and resonates with our target audience.

- Continuous Growth: Eager to learn and develop new skills, improving efficiency and mastering new tools and techniques.



What You’ll Deliver:

- Consistently produce captivating videos that resonate with our audience and align with our brand’s vision.

- Drive higher levels of interaction across social media and digital platforms, helping to boost views, shares, and brand awareness.

- Bring fresh ideas and creative solutions to the table, enhancing teamwork and contributing to a stronger, more unified creative process.



Why Work With Us?

- Creative Environment: You’ll have the opportunity to work on a variety of exciting projects that allow you to showcase your creativity and skills.

- Growth Opportunities: We believe in fostering personal and professional growth, offering training and development to help you expand your skill set.

- Supportive Team: Join a talented, collaborative team that values creativity and innovation.

- Flexible Work Environment: We offer flexible work options to support work-life balance.

- Competitive Pay & Benefits: We offer a competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.



Deliverables

How Success is Measured in This Role:

In this Video Editor role, success is defined by your ability to create powerful, visually engaging content that drives results and strengthens our brand. Here's what success looks like:

- Bring Still Images to Life: Use Adobe After Effects, Photoshop, and Illustrator to transform static images into dynamic, attention-grabbing animated ads.

- Video Editing & Motion Graphics: Take raw video footage and craft compelling narratives that speak to our audience. Combine video editing with motion graphics to produce engaging social media content and advertisements.

- Motion Graphics Design Expertise: Create stunning motion graphics that enhance video content, using your design skills to add visual appeal and depth to advertisements, social media posts, and promotional videos.

- Animate Static Assets: Transform still images and logos into dynamic animated visuals, elevating the storytelling experience and ensuring content stands out across multiple platforms.

- Graphic Design Mastery: Create visually compelling static graphics, including social media posts, website assets, and
 templates that align with our brand’s voice and aesthetic.

- Design Integration: Combine graphic design with video editing to create cohesive content, ensuring that all visual elements complement each other and enhance the storytelling experience.

- Adapt Content for Multiple Platforms: Re-edit video content into different aspect ratios for various platforms, ensuring optimal presentation and engagement.

- Collaborate with the Team: Work closely with the creative team and stakeholders to ensure your video content aligns with the brand strategy and meets project goals.

- Create Visual Masterpieces: Resize, cut out, and composite images to create eye-catching graphics that complement your video content.

- Maintain Quality: Ensure that all animations and video content are on-brand, visually appealing, and adhere to the highest standards.

- Meet Deadlines & Deliver on Expectations: Take ownership of project timelines and ensure your content is delivered on time, meeting or exceeding expectations.



What You’ll Deliver:

- Consistently produce captivating videos that resonate with our audience and align with our brand’s vision.

- Drive higher levels of interaction across social media and digital platforms, helping to boost views, shares, and brand awareness.

- Bring fresh ideas and creative solutions to the table, enhancing teamwork and contributing to a stronger, more unified creative process.

title: Email Marketing Manager (ECommerce) - Full Time, Remote
description:
We are looking for a strategic and performance-driven
 & SMS Marketing Manager to lead the charge in growing and optimizing our owned marketing channels. This role is key to delivering high-converting campaigns that drive customer engagement, retention, and revenue across our skincare and hair care product lines. You’ll turn customer insights into action, bringing value at every touchpoint while aligning messaging with product and brand goals.





Primary Duties and Responsibilities:

Own the strategy, execution, and optimization of all
 and SMS campaigns for multiple product lines (e.g., hair thinning shampoo, supplements, anti-aging SPF, and skin supplements).

Segment audiences and personalize messaging to maximize relevance, engagement, and conversion.

Develop and manage high-performing lifecycle flows including welcome, cart abandonment, post-purchase, and win-back sequences.

A/B test subject lines, content, offers, and creative assets to continuously improve key performance metrics (CTR, open rate, CVR, revenue per send).

Monitor and report on campaign performance; adjust strategy based on insights and trends.

Build surveys and gather customer feedback to inform future content and product ideas.

Collaborate with creative, product, and customer experience teams to ensure consistent and on-brand messaging.

Maintain a strong understanding of compliance and best practices in
/SMS marketing (e.g., CAN-SPAM, TCPA).

Suggest and implement new technologies, tools, and tactics to stay ahead of the curve.





Qualifications:

3+ years of experience in
 and SMS marketing, ideally in eCommerce or beauty/wellness.

Expert in Klaviyo or similar marketing automation platforms.

Strong writing skills and a keen eye for visual branding and user experience.

Solid understanding of customer behavior, segmentation, and marketing psychology.

Results-oriented with a deep passion for data, testing, and optimization.

Familiarity with tools like Rebuy or product recommendation engines is a plus.

Proactive, curious, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

Passion for skincare, wellness, and helping people feel their best.





What You’ll Help Shape:



Your role goes beyond sending campaigns—you’ll help us build smarter customer journeys by listening to our audience. You'll turn feedback into better product launches, sharper messaging, and a stronger brand voice. You’re part marketer, part strategist, part customer advocate.

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
Job Description:



Full-Time | Work From Home | Ecommerce & Influencer Partnerships



SRI Labs is a fast-growing, premium beauty & wellness ecommerce brand known for high-end skincare, hair tools, and breakthrough consumer products. We’re looking for a driven, organized, and relationship-focused Affiliate Manager to lead and scale our affiliate program across platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, and key influencer networks.



If you love partnering with creators, optimizing affiliate performance, and helping a brand grow through relationships — this is the role for you.



What You’ll Do



As our Affiliate Manager, you will own the entire affiliate ecosystem and work directly with the CEO and marketing leadership team to scale creator-led revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize SRI Labs’ affiliate program across ShopMy, Levanta, and other affiliate platforms.

Recruit, vet, and onboard new affiliates, creators, and influencers that align with our brand.

Build strong long-term relationships with partners to drive consistent revenue and brand growth.

Track performance, payouts, ROI, and ensure all affiliates are supported with assets, codes, and campaigns.

Coordinate affiliate-driven launches, seasonal promotions, and strategic campaigns.

Identify top performers and build incentive strategies to maximize their output.

Maintain reporting dashboards and communicate results to leadership weekly.

Collaborate with internal marketing, product, design, and operations teams to support affiliate needs.

Continuously test new platforms, creators, strategies, and incentives to grow revenue.

Who You Are



We’re looking for someone who is:



Based in the Philippines

Experienced in affiliate, influencer marketing, or digital partnerships (1–3+ years preferred).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage many creators and campaigns at once.

Strong at relationship-building — someone affiliates love to work with.

Comfortable working within platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, Impact, or similar tools.

Data-driven with excellent follow-through and communication skills.

Hungry, proactive, and passionate about helping a brand grow.

Why Join SRI Labs?



Remote work

Work directly with a high-performing founding team

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term growth potential within a fast-scaling ecommerce company

Supportive, positive culture built around speed, innovation, and passion for great products

Opportunity to make a big impact — your work will directly drive revenue and brand expansion

How to Apply



 your resume and a quick 2–3 sentence introduction 



Subject Line: Affiliate Manager – [Your Name]



Include:



Links to affiliate programs or creators you’ve worked with

Any relevant platforms/tools you’ve used

Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

Job Type: Full-time

title: Content Clipper (Short-Form Video) — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US

Young Publisher -

eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)
