title: Guest Experience Manager — Short-Term Rental Co-Hosting
description:
Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week. Primary coverage US Central Time business hours (approximately 10pm–7am Philippine Time) with on-call rotation for escalations.



Role Type: Senior role, manages one direct report



Job Overview

Divergent Estates is a US-based short-term rental co-hosting company managing 56+ properties across 15 states. We're growing toward 200 properties and are hiring a Guest Experience Manager to own the full guest journey — from booking to post-stay review — and lead a small team.



This is a senior role for someone who has done STR guest experience work before, has handled real claims with Airbnb and Vrbo, and is ready to coach a Coordinator while owning strategy. If you're used to being the person others escalate to, this is for you.



What You'll Own

• High-stakes guest situations and difficult conversations

• Claims and disputes end-to-end (8–12/month): documentation, Airbnb/Vrbo case management, negotiation, insurance coordination

• Review management: owner-approved responses, spotting patterns, coordinating post-stay asks

• Coaching and managing one Guest Experience Coordinator (daily support, weekly 1:1s)

• Guest communication strategy: templates, SOPs, tone, escalation logic, AI messaging optimization

• Cross-functional coordination with Maintenance and Cleaning teams

• 24/7 coverage planning and on-call escalation logic



Success in the First 90 Days Looks Like

• Average human response time drops from 11 minutes to under 5 minutes

• Negative guest sentiment drops from 7.9% toward 4%

• Claim resolution time shortens, recovery amounts improve

• The Coordinator is handling 80%+ of routine guest comms without escalation

• Owners report fewer surprises and faster communication on guest issues



Must-Have Qualifications

• Minimum 3 years in short-term rental or hospitality guest experience (direct, not adjacent)

• Experience managing or coaching at least one direct report

• Hands-on experience with Airbnb and Vrbo claims and disputes (can speak fluently about AirCover, case escalations, and what works in pushing back)

• Exceptional written English — clear, warm, professional

• Proficient with Hostaway, Breezeway, Airbnb, Vrbo, Asana, Slack

• Comfortable on phone calls with upset guests and US-based property owners

• Reliable schedule and high-speed internet

• Available during US Central Time business hours



What Makes the Best Candidates Stand Out

• You've personally hosted or managed STR properties

• You can de-escalate a guest situation over text with tone alone

• You've coached a tea
mber fro
diocre to strong

• You have opinions on what makes AI guest messaging work or fail

• You've successfully pushed back on Airbnb when they got claims wrong



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your resume

2. A 150–300 word written response to: “Describe the most difficult guest situation you've personally handled. What made it difficult, what you did, what the outcome was, and what you would do differently.”

3. A 100–200 word written response to: “What's one thing most property managers get wrong about guest experience?”

4. Any links to writing samples, guest responses, or review responses you've written



Applications without the written responses will not be reviewed.





Finalists will complete a paid 2–3 hour trial task with real anonymized scenarios from our business.

title: Content Clipper (Short-Form Video) — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset

/to/v0OA9cFs

title: Admin Assistant for High-Level Clients
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Administrative Assistant. This role is responsible for overseeing Mike Barron’s high-level clients. The Administrative Assistant will work directly with the owner of the company and the supervisors, who will play a vital role in supporting our high-level students, ensuring their success when it comes to building a company. Your primary responsibility will be to manage high level accounts, keep these accounts organized, work with the owner of the company when it comes to scheduling, ensure that these clients are completing the program and utilizing all inside personnel to get tasks completed.



Responsibilities:

Work directly with founder Mike Barron and his supervisors to manage and support high-level client accounts.

Schedule meetings between Mike Barron, supervisors, and partners to ensure alignment and progress.

Equip partners with the essential tools they need for success.

Serve as the primary point of contact for partners, handling communication across various channels with professionalism and efficiency.

Manage invitations to partner events featuring Mike Barron, confirming attendance and ensuring seamless coordination.

Oversee client progress in programs, ensuring they are meeting milestones and utilizing all available resources and personnel.

Keep accounts and schedules organized to streamline operations and enhance client satisfaction.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven experience as an Administrative Assistant or in a similar role.

Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills.

Strong written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency with scheduling tools.

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.

A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a client-focused approach.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
/watch?v=LdqINft4osw&t=75s.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.

title: Meta Ads Video Editor for scaling 6-Figure ecommerce brand
description:
**JOB DESCRIPTION**



Hey there, I’m Carter, founder of a fast-growing DTC brand scaling through Meta 
 & Instagram) ads.



We’ve generated consistent revenue using paid social, and now I’m looking to bring on a **high-level Meta Ads Video Editor** who understands how to turn simple scripts into scroll-stopping ads.



We primarily run **AI UGC-style creatives**, so your role is not just editing — it’s helping bring concepts to life using AI-generated footage, clean editing, and strong hooks that actually stop the scroll.



You must understand how to structure ads that perform.



---



**Your Role**



Turn scripts into high-converting Meta ads using AI UGC.



Each concept = **3 videos**



* Same body

* Different hooks



Your job is to:



* Generate or source AI UGC-style footage

* Edit clean, native-looking ads (iPhone-style, not overproduced)

* Swap hooks effectively while keeping the body consistent

* Add simple captions, pacing, and flow that keeps retention high



Everything should feel natural, not like an ad.



---



**What We’re Looking For**



* Experience editing **Meta ads for DTC brands**

* Strong understanding of **hook-first structure (first 1–3 seconds matter most)**

* Ability to create or work with **AI UGC-style content**

* Knows how to keep edits clean, simple, and native (no flashy YouTube-style editing)

* Understands pacing, retention, and what makes people keep watching



---



**This Is NOT For You If**



* You only edit long-form YouTube videos

* You rely on heavy effects, transitions, or over-editing

* You don’t understand direct response / performance creatives

* You need constant direction — I need someone who gets it



---



**Bonus If You:**



* Have worked with AI video tools (Higgsfield, Sora, etc.)

* Can replicate high-performing ad styles

* Understand testing structure (hooks vs body)



---



**How to Apply**



Send:



1. Examples of Meta ads you’ve edited (especially UGC or AI UGC)

2. Brief explanation of your process

3. Confirm you understand this structure:



   * 1 concept = 3 videos

   * Same body, different hooks

title: System Administrator & Support Specialist
description:
PFS Global is seeking to hire a remote, tech savvy System Administrator to work for our full-service business management company which is located in California, United States. This is a dual-purpose role focused on modernizing our infrastructure and providing high-level technical support. You will be instrumental in our transition from legacy on-premise setups to a cloud-first architecture. We are looking to fill this position immediately. Please only apply if you meet the below qualifications:



Qualifications:

1 - Must type 55 WPM (you will be tested)

2 - Must have minimum internet speeds of 25/25 mbps (download/upload)

3 - Team player with excellent communication skills in English

4 - Full-time availability at 40 hours / week , Mon - Fri (Pacific Standard Time)



Key Responsibilities:

• Project Work (70%): Infrastructure deployment, Azure management, automation, and cloud migration.

• Support/Help Desk (30%): User troubleshooting, device enrollment, and ticketing via Jira.

• Infrastructure Modernization: Decommissioning on-prem servers and migrating to serverless/cloud environments.

• Device Management: Enrolling workstations, managing user attributes and device policies.

• Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs): Creating clear, step-by-step documentation for common IT tasks (e.g., "How to Reset a Password," "How to Setup OpenVPN").

• AI & Automation: Working alongside me to implement cloud-first and AI-powered automation. We will use AI to generate code, or use it to make decisions in a larger algorithm.

Administrative Support: Assisting the broader admin team with routing phone calls and managing high-priority service requests.



Technical Requirements (The "Must-Haves")

The ideal candidate doesn't need 10 years of experience, but they must have a fundamental, deep understanding of how the internet and networking work. Cloud & Virtualization



• Azure: Managing Virtual Machines, Files, and Microsoft Entra ID.

• Google Workspace: Admin-level management including Gmail, Drive & App Script

• Identity Management: User management in Google Workspace, Microsoft Entra, and Active Directory

• Virtual Desktops: Supporting On-Prem RDS Environments and/or Azure Virtual Desktop Productivity & Automation

• Scripting: Familiarity with automation via scripting languages (Bash, PowerShell, JavaScript, Python, etc.)

• Configuration Management: understanding of config file formats (JSON, YAML, INI, etc.). Also, OS Configuration like environmental variables and “PATH” management.

• Ticketing: Experience with Jira Service Management.



Candidate Persona & Culture Fit

• We want someone who is genuinely curious about technology and spends their free time learning how things work under the hood.

• We value fundamental knowledge and "hunger" over specific years of experience in a single tool.

• Must be able to follow technical flowcharts and documentation to execute complex tasks independently.

• High-proficiency in English (required for system management and global team collaboration).

• You will need to create flowcharts and documentation in English as well, so writing is important.



Monthly Compensation Package: ?51,500 (Inclusive of Basic Hourly Pay, De Minimis Benefits, and Non-Taxable Allowances.) Paid as an Employee through our Philippines Representative Office. 



Paid as an Employee through our Philippines Representative Office.



If you meet the above qualifications, and the description above sounds like the position that you are looking for, please apply and forward us your typing (WPM) and internet (upload/download) speeds in order to get an interview.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat !
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Instagram DM Setter / Sales Support for Women’s Online Fitness Coaching Brand
description:
Set The Standard (STS) is a women-focused online fitness coaching business built around body composition change, confidence, structure and long-term results.



We help women stop spinning their wheels and start making real progress through personalised coaching that fits their life. Our brand is known for being warm, direct, high-standard and genuinely supportive without being fluffy or overhyped.



This is not a generic sales role and it is not a mass-DM role. We care deeply about the client experience, brand voice and the quality of every interaction in our inbox. We want someone who can help us manage and move conversations properly while protecting the trust we have built.



You will be supporting a brand that values strong communication, organisation, emotional intelligence and commercial awareness. If you are thoughtful, sharp, reliable and want to be part of a business with high standards, this role could be a very strong fit.



What we are hiring:



We are hiring a DM Setter / Sales Support tea
mber to help manage Instagram conversations, warm leads, support inbound and outbound messaging, move the right women toward calls or applications and keep our lead flow organised.



This role is relationship-heavy first and sales-heavy second. We are not looking for a pushy closer or someone who relies on robotic scripts. We are looking for someone who can read people well, communicate naturally, ask good questions, follow clear SOPs and know when to move a conversation forward versus when to escalate.



You will be working inside our Instagram ecosystem, helping with inbound enquiries, warm outbound, follow-up, comment support, basic lead qualification, CRM updates, and daily reporting. You must be able to sound human, brand-aligned, and emotionally intelligent while still keeping conversations commercially useful.



This is a high-trust role. You will be handling real conversations with real women, so tone, judgement, confidentiality, and consistency matter a lot.



This role has capacity to move into more hours of work.

title: Content & SEO Virtual Assistant
description:
We are building a high-performance content engine and are looking for a detail-oriented and intelligent Virtual Assistant to help us turn one piece of content into multiple high-quality outputs across platforms and websites.



Upload and format articles across multiple WordPress sites

Adjust titles, headings, and introductions to avoid duplicate content

Insert internal links and relevant calls-to-action

Optimise posts for readability and basic SEO



Content Distribution



Schedule and post content across platforms 
, LinkedIn, etc.)

Work within a structured weekly content calendar



We do NOT want:



Copy-paste content

Generic AI writing

Low-quality or spam-style articles



Everything we produce must be:



Clean

Thoughtful

High-quality

Slightly tailored per website



To apply:



1. Send one graphic design you have done.

2. Send a link to an article you have written.

3. Send a video of you discussing your experience and readines for the role.

title: Experienced Long Form Video Editor
description:
We are seeking a skilled and experienced overseas editor who specializes in commercial and short-form content video editing. As an editor, you will be responsible for creating visually stunning and engaging videos that showcase our brand and products. You should be a dedicated employee who is quick on their feet and has excellent attention to detail.



Responsibilities:

- Collaborate with our creative team to understand the vision and direction for each video project

- Edit and enhance raw footage into high-quality, polished videos

- Color-grade footage to ensure consistency and visual appeal

- Add animations and special effects as needed to enhance the video's impact

- Meet project deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously

- Review and incorporate feedback from stakeholders to ensure the final product meets expectations

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and techniques to continually improve your skills and the quality of our videos





Requirements:



- 4+ years of experience as a video editor, with a portfolio that showcases your expertise in commercial and short-form content editing

- Proficient in video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, Avid and DaVinci Resolve

- Experience with Adobe After Effects (motion graphics required)  

- Strong knowledge of color grading and animation techniques

- Experience working with various video formats and codecs

- Excellent attention to detail and ability to work independently

- Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively with a remote team



Our Sample work: 







Compensation:

We offer a starting range of $800–$1,000/month based on experience. If you have higher rates, feel free to apply and share your expected salary.



(Higher rates will be considered for strong portfolios and motion graphics experience)



If you are a creative and skilled editor who is passionate about creating visually stunning videos and enhancing brand awareness, we encourage you to apply. This is a full-time remote position with flexible hours, and we offer competitive compensation based on experience and skills.



Work Schedule:

- Preferably night shift, but we are open to daytime editors depending on experience  



???? How to Apply:

Please send your application to 
 with the following:



-Your portfolio/demo reel (required)

-A short introduction about your experience

-Your availability and preferred working hours

title: Registration Coordinator of Behavioral Health Psych Services
description:
Position Overview:

The Registration Coordinator at plays a crucial role in supporting the administrative functions of our organization by overseeing client and participant registration processes. This position ensures smooth operations by managing data entry, maintaining accurate records, and providing excellent customer service to clients and staff. The ideal candidate will be organized, detail-oriented, and possess strong communication skills to facilitate the on boarding and registration of participants in various programs.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Registration Management: Handle all aspects of client and participant registration, including data collection, entry, and verification to ensure accuracy.

Record Maintenance: Maintain accurate and up-to-date client and program participant records, ensuring data confidentiality and compliance with regulatory standards.

Customer Support: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients during the registration process, responding to inquiries via phone,
, or in person with professionalism and clarity.

Program Coordination: Work closely with program staff to ensure that all registration materials are properly processed and participants are ready to begin services.

Billing and Documentation: Assist in preparing registration-related documents, tracking client payments, and coordinating with the billing department as needed.

Report Generation: Compile and distribute registration status reports to management and relevant staff to provide updates on participant on boarding.

Scheduling: Coordinate with other departments to schedule intake appointments, orientations, and any other relevant meetings as part of the registration process.



Qualifications:

Education: High school diploma or equivalent required; an associate’s degree or higher in a relevant field preferred.

Experience: At least 1 year of experience in a clerical, administrative, or customer service role. Experience in a healthcare, behavioral health, or developmental disabilities setting is a plus.

Technical Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook) and experience with data entry and record-keeping systems.

Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a customer-focused attitude.

Organization: Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines efficiently.

Attention to Detail: Exceptional accuracy in data management and document preparation.

Interpersonal Skills: Ability to work collaboratively with tea
mbers and interact professionally with clients and staff.



Working Conditions:

This is a full-time position.

Some evening or weekend availability may be required based on program needs.

title: Accountant (US Taxation, Payroll and QuickBooks Specialist)
description:
Are you a highly analytical Accountant with strong US taxation and payroll experience and a passion for working with diverse clients?



We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly analytical Accountant with solid experience in US taxation, payroll processing, and proficiency in QuickBooks. This role requires someone who has handled multiple clients and can confidently manage financial records, ensure compliance, and provide accurate reporting.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage and maintain accurate financial records for multiple clients

• Prepare and review financial statements and reports

• Handle US tax-related tasks including compliance and filings

• Process payroll and ensure timely and accurate employee compensation

• Perform bookkeeping tasks using QuickBooks

• Reconcile accounts and resolve discrepancies

• Analyze financial data to support decision-making

• Communicate with clients regarding financial matters when necessary



Qualifications:

• Female, 28 years old and above

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Proven experience in US taxation

• Experience in payroll processing

• Proficient in QuickBooks

• Experience handling multiple clients/accounts

• Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong communication and organizational skills

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Tools You Will Use:

• QuickBooks, Vlook and Pivot experience required



Working Hours:

• Full-Time - Monday to Friday

• 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (Graveyard Shift)



Compensation:

• $5–6 per hour



Preferred Traits:

• Highly analytical mindset

• Proactive and resourceful

• Strong sense of accountability

• Adaptable and able to work in a fast-paced environment

• Client-focused with a professional attitude



Non-Negotiables:

• Screenshot and productivity tracker required

• Good credit score

• Ability to work during the Graveyard Shift (US Timezone)



HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered, please send the following:

1. Your updated resume

2. A short video introduction showcasing why you're the perfect fit for the role



If you don’t have experience in this area, we kindly ask that you refrain from applying at this time.

title: Client Success Manager (Coaching and Feedback) – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.

- Proactively follow up with clients to keep them on track and help them take action



Important Note: This role requires regular proactive follow-up with clients. If you're not comfortable with this, please consider carefully before applying - it's a core part of the position.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Onboarding Representatives
description:
About the Role



Agenta is a LinkedIn growth and acquisition agency scaling fast. We run a high-volume setter onboarding operation and we need someone who can own the hiring call pipeline end to end.



You will be speaking directly with applicants, walking them through the role, building trust, handling objections, and securing account access from every qualified setter we bring on. This is a calls-based role. You are the last filter between us and a fully onboarded operator.



What You Will Be Doing



- Running 20 to 30 onboarding and hiring calls per week with DM Setter applicants

- Walking applicants through the role structure, compensation, and access requirements

- Handling objections confidently and keeping the conversation moving toward a close

- Collecting LinkedIn credentials and inputting account details into our internal software (MoreLogin)

- Maintaining an organized tracker of call outcomes, applicant status, and onboarding progress

- Reporting directly to the founder on pipeline health and conversion rates



Who We Are Looking For



- Proven experience on sales, recruiting, or persuasion-based calls. This is non-negotiable

- Fluent English speaker with strong verbal communication and the ability to hold a conversation under pressure

- Comfortable with the close. You do not fold when someone pushes back

- Organized and reliable. You track your work, follow up, and do not drop the ball

- Tech comfortable. Able to navigate basic software tools and follow a process



How to Apply

To be considered you must submit all three of the following:



A reference or verifiable proof of prior call experience. A past employer contact, a portfolio, a recorded call sample, or equivalent.



Applications missing any of these three will not be reviewed.



Compensation



Remote | Flexible hours within availability windows

title: Jr. Account Executive | Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company
description:
Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Experience Level: Entry-Level (with or without experience)

Base pay of Php 19,715.00 – Php 28,600.00 + monthly performance-based incentives



We are a growing U.S.-based mortgage company looking for a Jr. Account Executive to join our team. This role is not just administrative. You will be responsible for supporting loan operations while also helping drive business growth through outbound calling, lead generation, and relationship building with broker partners.



This position is ideal for fresh graduates or early-career professionals who are confident communicators, proactive, and comfortable speaking with people, following up consistently, and building long-term professional relationships.



Key Responsibilities



Conduct outbound cold calls to prospective and existing broker partners

Perform lead generation and outreach to grow our broker network

Build and maintain strong relationships with external broker partners

Follow up consistently with brokers to drive submissions and loan volume

Assist brokers and loan processors in collecting, reviewing, and organizing borrower documents

Coordinate with brokers, processors, and internal teams throughout the loan process

Follow up on missing documents, conditions, and outstanding requirements

Upload and manage files in the loan origination system

Ensure all documents are complete, accurate, and properly labeled

Maintain file notes, status updates, and internal records

Communicate updates between underwriting, processing, sales teams, and broker partners

Help keep loan files on track to meet turnaround timelines



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, or related field is a plus but not required

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Comfortable with cold calling and outbound communication

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

Proactive, reliable, and results-driven

Basic knowledge of Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

Willingness to learn U.S. mortgage processes (training will be provided)



Specific Requirements



Reliable high-speed internet connection

Backup internet or data plan (mobile hotspot or secondary ISP)

Quiet and professional work environment

Willingness to work full-time during U.S. business hours (PST), equivalent to 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time



Nice to Have



Experience in BPO, sales, lead generation, or customer service

Experience in cold calling or outbound sales

Familiarity with U.S. mortgage terms and loan process

Experience working with brokers or in relationship-based roles



Why join us?



Base pay of Php 19,715 – Php 28,600 with salary progression plus performance-based incentives

Opportunity to grow into a sales or Account Executive role

Paid training and continuous support provided

Supportive and collaborative team environment

Long-term remote role with career growth potential

Exposure to real-world U.S. mortgage operations and business development



How to Apply



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions below carefully.



Submit your updated resume in PDF format or as a link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or OLJ profile)

If submitting a link, make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view”

Include your relevant experience (Mortgage, Sales, BPO, Admin, or Customer Service)

Include your expected monthly salary in PHP

Include your earliest start date or availability



Please also answer the following questions in your application:



Are you aware that the working schedule is 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time, and are you able to work consistently during these hours?

Are you comfortable making outbound calls during this schedule?

Do you have a quiet and dedicated workspace suitable for calls?

What experience do you have with cold calling or outbound sales? Please briefly describe your role and results.



Important



Start your application with this exact line: “I have read the job post from beginning to end.”



Shortlisted Candidates



Will be asked to submit a speedtest (at least 100 MBPS required; screenshot from speedtest.net)

Will provide computer specifications (16 GB RAM and processor)

Will answer short scenario-based questions



Note



Only applicants who follow the instructions above will be prioritized for review



We are looking for reliable and motivated individuals who are serious about building a long-term career in both mortgage operations and business development. If that sounds like you, apply now. We review applications daily.

title: Executive Assistant (Remote)
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant (Remote)



Location: Remote



Job Type: Full-Time



Salary: Competitive



Job Summary: We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support our leadership team. The ideal candidate is capable of handling a wide range of administrative and executive support tasks with professionalism and discretion. Korean language proficiency (spoken and written) is an advantage but not required. This is a work-from-home (WFH) position, offering flexibility while maintaining a high level of productivity and accountability.



> Responsibilities

Manage and prioritize the executive’s schedule, including appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements.

Communicate effectively with internal and external stakeholders in English; Korean language skills are a plus.

Translate documents,
s, and conversations as needed.

Prepare reports, presentations, and other documentation.

title: Senior Non-QM Mortgage Underwriter (Remote | Night Shift)
description:
Senior Non-QM Mortgage Underwriter (Remote | Night Shift)

Php 70,000 – Php 188,179/month (based on experience)

Full-Time | Permanent Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company



>Why This Role is Different



We’re not looking for a basic underwriter.



We’re hiring someone who can confidently review and approve complex Non-QM loans — someone who understands risk, moves fast, and knows how to make solid credit decisions.



If you have strong Non-QM experience and want to work directly with a growing U.S.-based mortgage team, this is a long-term opportunity with real impact.



> What You’ll Be Doing



Underwrite Non-QM loans (DSCR, Bank Statement, WVOE, P&L)



Analyze credit, income, assets, and collateral



Review AUS findings and apply conditions or overlays



Issue decisions: Approve, Deny, or Suspend



Work closely with processors and operations to clear conditions



Maintain strong turn times while ensuring compliance



Support junior tea
mbers when needed



> What We’re Looking For



At least 5 years U.S. mortgage underwriting experience



Strong Non-QM experience (DSCR, Bank Statement, etc.)



Experience handling self-employed borrowers and complex files



Solid understanding of U.S. mortgage guidelines (TRID, ATR/QM, etc.)



Able to make independent credit decisions



Detail-oriented and reliable in a remote setup



Plus (but not required):



Experience with Encompass



Korean, Chinese, or Vietnamese language skills



> Work Setup



Remote (Work from Home)



Night Shift: 11:30 PM – 8:30 AM PH Time



Stable, long-term role with a U.S.-based company



> Basic Requirements



At least 16GB RAM



Intel i5 (4th gen or newer) or equivalent



Stable internet (minimum 100 Mbps)



>> How to Apply



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions below carefully:



1. All applicants must submit their application via
 sent directly through OnlineJobs.ph.

Applications sent outside of OnlineJobs.ph will not be considered.



Include the following in your application message:



Updated Resume (PDF or link — Google Drive/Dropbox/OLJ profile)

If submitting a link, make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view”



Years of U.S. Mortgage Underwriting Experience



Years of Non-QM Experience (DSCR, Bank Statement, etc.)



Expected Monthly Salary (PHP)



Earliest Start Date / Availability



2. Answer This Question (Required)



In your application message, briefly answer:



What are the three main documents you review when underwriting a DSCR loan?



(Keep your answer short and direct.)



3. Important



To confirm you have read the job post, please include this line at the beginning of your message:



“I have Non-QM underwriting experience.”



4. For Shortlisted Candidates Only



If you are shortlisted, you will be asked to complete a quick follow-up step, which includes:



Internet speed test (screenshot from speedtest.net)



Computer specifications (RAM and processor)



Short Non-QM scenario-based questions



>> Note



Only applicants who follow the instructions above will be prioritized for review.



>> Shortlisted Candidates



Qualified applicants will be invited to complete a short screening step, which may include:



Quick technical questions (Non-QM / DSCR)



Speedtest and computer specs



Brief experience validation



>> Final Note



We’re looking for serious underwriters who know how to assess risk and make confident decisions.



If that’s you, apply now — we review applications daily.

title: AI Automation Engineer / Senior Programmer (Python, APIs, Automation) – Remote
description:
Job Title: AI Automation Engineer / Senior Programmer (Python, APIs, Automation) – Remote

Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Salary: Php100,000 – Php160,000 per month (based on experience)



We are a growing U.S.-based company looking for a high-performing AI Automation Engineer / Senior Programmer who can build real automation systems that improve how our business operates.



This is not a junior programming role. We are looking for someone who can solve problems, design systems, and build automation that replaces manual work.



If you know how to connect APIs, build automation workflows, and use AI tools to streamline operations, this role may be a great fit.



This is a long-term remote position for a Philippines-based developer who wants to work directly with a U.S. company.



>> What You Will Be Doing

Design and build AI-powered automation systems

Develop scripts, integrations, and internal tools that eliminate repetitive work

Connect APIs, databases, and automation platforms

Identify manual processes and replace them with automation

Work directly with leadership to implement automation solutions

Improve system performance, scalability, and efficiency



>>Required Skills

2–5 years programming experience

Strong skills in Python, JavaScript, or similar languages

Experience working with APIs and system integrations

Experience building automation workflows or internal tools

Strong analytical and problem-solving ability

Ability to take an idea and turn it into a working automation system

Experience with AI tools, LLMs, or machine learning APIs

Experience building automation for business operations

Knowledge of cloud platforms or automation platforms

Experience integrating multiple systems and APIs



>>Compensation & Benefits

Php100,000 – Php160,000 monthly salary depending on experience

Long-term stable remote position

Work directly with a U.S. company

Opportunity to work on real AI automation systems



>>Security & Work Requirements

Due to the sensitive nature of this role, strict confidentiality and security policies will apply.

Must be willing to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)

Must use a dedicated work computer for company work

title: Clips Coordinator - Marketing Team
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Clips Coordinator - Marketing Team. This role is responsible for reviewing raw video content and identifying key segments for short-form and long-form video production. This role is essential in curating compelling content that aligns with the company’s storytelling and branding efforts. The selected clips are supplied to the Virality Engineer for quality assessment and final approval before production.



Responsibilities:

Review raw video footage and identify engaging 
nts for content creation.

Timestamp and categorize video segments for short-form and long-form edits.

Collaborate closely with the Marketing Director to determine the viability of selected content, upcoming and current projects.

Ensure thorough content review and maximize the use of available footage.

Maintain and organize content using the Asana Video Project Board.

Assist in repurposing content for multiple platforms, including TikTok, YouTube, and marketing campaigns.

Work alongside other marketing units such as Graphic Design and Social Media to support content strategy.

Track and update project progress, ensuring deadlines are met.

Maintain proper organization of raw assets in designated storage locations.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Strong understanding of VIDEO CONTENT and storytelling techniques.

Ability to work collaboratively with various teams.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Experience using project management tools (e.g., Asana) preferred.

Knowledge of digital marketing and social media trends is a plus.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
.



A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.



For faster processing, please
 us your portfolio at 
 (
). Include the job title in the subject line. Thank you.

title: Senior SEO Content Writer - Must DO Application Requirements
description:
Role Overview



We are hiring a Senior SEO Content Writer to take full ownership of content that drives organic traffic, rankings, and conversions.



This is not a generic writing role. You will be responsible for understanding search intent, building content structure, and producing content that performs.



You must be able to think strategically, execute independently, and consistently produce content aligned with both SEO and brand voice.



A strong understanding of EEAT (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) is required.



Key Responsibilities

Plan and execute SEO content strategy based on business goals

Conduct keyword research, SERP analysis, and search intent mapping

Build detailed content outlines and briefs before writing

Write high-quality, long-form content (blogs, landing pages, guides)

Edit and refine content to improve clarity, structure, and performance

Optimize existing content for rankings, CTR, and conversions

Implement strong on-page SEO (headings, internal linking, structure)

Apply EEAT principles through depth, accuracy, and credible sourcing

Use AI tools effectively by creating, refining, and improving prompts

Track content performance and iterate based on data

Writing, Editing, and Brand Voice

Must be able to quickly understand and adapt to different brand voices

Strong ability to maintain tone, consistency, and positioning across content

Excellent editing skills — able to improve clarity, flow, and readability

High attention to detail in grammar, sentence structure, and formatting

Mastery of prepositions, punctuation, and written English is required

Able to turn rough inputs into clear, structured, on-brand content

Industry Exposure



You should be comfortable writing across multiple industries. Please show experience in areas such as:



SaaS

Agencies / marketing services

Local businesses

E-commerce

B2B services

Any technical or specialized industries



You must be able to research and produce authoritative content in unfamiliar domains.



Requirements

4–6+ years of experience in SEO content writing

Proven track record of ranking content on Google

Strong understanding of search intent, on-page SEO, and content structure

Clear understanding and application of EEAT in content

Strong ability to create, modify, and refine AI prompts for content generation

Excellent command of English, including grammar, punctuation, and sentence construction

Experience with tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Surfer, Clearscope, or similar

Strong research and analytical thinking

KPIs

Organic traffic growth

Keyword rankings (Top 3 / Top 10)

Content-driven conversions

Quality and consistency of output

Performance improvements on updated content

Application Requirements



To be considered, you must include the following:



3–5 SEO articles you have written that are currently ranking. Include target keywords and performance details if available

A short breakdown of one article:

Search intent

Why it performed (or didn’t)

What you would improve



A structured content outline for:

"SEO agency for small business" (Warren Digital)



Your outline must include:



Primary and secondary search intent

Target audience and stage of awareness

Logical heading structure (H1–H3)

Key sections required to compete with top-ranking pages

How you would differentiate the content

Where and how you would include conversion elements (CTAs, trust signals)

EEAT signals you would incorporate (case studies, proof, authority, etc.)

A Loom video (5–10 minutes) where you:

Analyze a top-ranking article for a keyword

Explain why it ranks

Break down structure, intent, and SEO elements

Identify EEAT signals

Explain how you would outperform it

List the industries you have written for

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:

title: E-Comm Email and Ad Designer
description:
Job Description: Creative Designer



Position Overview:



We are seeking a talented and versatile Designer with expertise in developing marketing ads and
 for E-commerce brands to join our dynamic marketing team. The ideal candidate will specialize in both Klaviyo
 design and crafting compelling social ad creatives, including video, motion, and static assets. 



As a key member of our team, you will be responsible for creating visually striking, high-converting ad creatives for our clients' paid social campaigns and designing engaging
 campaigns that effectively communicate our brand message, driving both customer engagement and conversions. 



As a member of the Production Team, you will be working under the Director of Production, but report directly to the Creative Strategist and
 Marketing Lead. You will also work with other members of the production and design team to produce high-quality, on-brand designs that seamlessly align with our comprehensive marketing strategy.



Responsibilities:



Collaborate with the Creative Strategist and
 Strategist: Work closely with the team to understand client objectives, target audience, and campaign requirements.

Design High-Quality Ad Creatives: Create visually appealing and compelling ad content that effectively communicates the client's message and captures the attention of the target audience, while staying within Andromeda’s updated creative standards. 

Transform Client Assets: Utilize client-provided assets such as videos, images, and brand guidelines to develop ad-ready content, ensuring that it aligns with the client's brand identity and campaign goals.

Leverage AI tools to generate high-quality visuals when client assets are limited, including transforming product images into static, motion, and video creatives, enhancing existing assets, and producing on-brand content that aligns with platform best practices and client standards.

Conceptualize and Ideate: Generate innovative ideas and concepts for ad designs, considering current design trends, platform best practices, and target audience preferences.

Must understand and meet Meta’s creative diversity standards by developing clearly distinct ad concepts (not minor details of the same design). Consistently test different angles, formats, and layouts so each ad looks and feels unique.

Adapt and Optimize Designs: Modify and optimize existing designs based on feedback from the creative strategist,
 strategist, and client, ensuring that the final creatives meet the desired specifications and objectives within a timely manner.

Maintain Design Quality: Uphold high-quality standards for all ad creatives, ensuring that they are visually appealing, error-free, and optimized for various platforms and devices.

Design and Develop
 Campaigns: Craft visually compelling
 campaigns in Klaviyo or other designated
 marketing platforms, using assets from the client, to support our e-commerce objectives.

AI Designs: Utilize AI image-generation tools to create engaging, on-brand visuals for
 marketing campaigns, including promotional graphics, product features, lifestyle imagery, and seasonal campaign assets to enhance customer engagement and conversion.

Collaborate with the Team: Coordinate and collaborate with tea
mbers to ensure proactive communication and alignment on objectives, deadlines and timelines. 

Stay Updated on Design Trends: You are Shopanova’s go to for design trends, emerging technologies, AI tools, and best practices in the advertising and e-commerce industries. We expect you to apply this knowledge to enhance the quality and effectiveness of ad and
 designs.

A great creator never sits idle, we expect you to proactively show our team the newest and best tools as new technology emerges.



Qualifications:

Proven experience in graphic design, visual communication, or a related field, preferably in an agency or digital marketing environment.

Proven experience as an
 Designer or similar role, with a strong portfolio showcasing your expertise in designing successful
 campaigns.

Proficient in using Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms to create and manage
 campaigns.

Proficient in graphic design and video editing software such as Canva, Figma, Capcut or equivalent tools.

Strong portfolio demonstrating a solid understanding of design principles and showcasing previous ad design work for e-commerce brands.

Excellent visual and creative skills, with a keen eye for detail and aesthetics.

Ability to work collaboratively and take direction from the Director of Production and strategists, incorporating feedback to refine designs.

Strong time management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

Familiarity with social media platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok) and their respective ad formats and specifications.

Basic understanding of e-commerce and digital marketing concepts.

Excellent communication skills to effectively communicate ideas and concepts.



Note: This is a general overview of the role and responsibilities. Additional duties may be assigned as needed.

You’ll research and target the right keywords, optimize web pages and content, improve on-page elements like titles and meta tags, and build strong off-page strategies through quality link-building. You’ll also track performance with SEO tools, run regular audits to keep our site search-engine friendly, and stay updated on the latest SEO trends. Working closely with our marketing and content teams, you’ll help us rank higher, reach more people, and deliver measurable results.

Enhance on-page SEO (titles, meta tags, links, and site structure).

Build quality backlinks and strengthen off-page presence.

Track performance with SEO tools and deliver insights.

Stay ahead of SEO trends and search engine updates.

The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js / Firebase) – Part-Time / Full-Time | Remote
description:
We are seeking a Backend Developer to support and enhance our existing applications running in a Node.js and Firebase environment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). In this role, you will help maintain live systems, introduce new functionality, and ensure the backend infrastructure continues to operate efficiently and securely.



This opportunity is well suited for someone comfortable working with production systems and capable of making sound technical decisions when improving backend architecture.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain and enhance backend services supporting live applications

- Develop and improve backend functionality using Node.js and Firebase

- Build and maintain RESTful APIs, cloud functions, and serverless components

- Evaluate system architecture and propose improvements when needed

- Monitor and improve system stability, performance, and security

- Handle deployments and maintain CI/CD pipelines and version control processes

- Work with the outgoing developer to ensure a smooth project transition

- Deliver ongoing updates, feature enhancements, and production support



Required Qualifications;

- 5+ years of backend development experience

- 3+ years of hands-on experience with Node.js and Firebase

- Experience deploying and managing applications on Google Cloud Platform

- Demonstrated experience building and maintaining REST APIs and serverless backend systems

- Experience managing production environments with a focus on performance, security, and reliability (Firebase Auth, IAM roles, HTTPS, JWT)

- Familiarity with Git-based version control systems such as GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket

- Experience implementing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Cloud Build)

- Strong analytical thinking and ability to independently recommend technical improvements

- Clear English communication skills, especially when explaining technical approaches



Preferred Experience:

- Experience working with Firebase Cloud Functions or GCP Cloud Functions in serverless environments

- Familiarity with additional GCP services such as Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, or Cloud Storage

- Experience working with financial or fintech applications involving secure systems and transaction processing

- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as Firebase Analytics or GCP Logging/Monitoring

- Experience implementing secure authentication and authorization methods including OAuth or JWT

- Exposure to Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools

- Experience managing staging and production environments and release processes

- Familiarity with API documentation tools such as Swagger or OpenAPI

- Experience guiding backend direction or mentoring developers during project transitions



Work Schedule:

- Part-Time (Approximately 20 hours per week)

- Full-Time (Available)

Flexible working hours between 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time

Essential

Microsoft Office / Google Workspace

Highly Desirable

Experience in residential construction (preferably high-end projects)

Experience with estimating and quoting

Understanding of construction workflows, trades, and terminology

Personal Attributes

Proactive and solution-focused

Professional and client-facing mindset

Strong follow-up and accountability

Ability to work independently and take initiative

Comfortable communicating with trades and stakeholders

Working Arrangement

Remote (Virtual Assistant role)

Flexible hours, but must be responsive during agreed working windows

Ongoing role with potential for long-term growth

Success in This Role Looks Like

Projects are consistently on schedule and well-documented

Clients receive clear, professional updates

Site teams are well-supported and coordinated

Financial tracking is accurate and up to date

Quotes are professional, detailed, and win work

title: Creative Strategist (Ecommerce Paid Social Ads / UGC Concepts)
description:
I’m looking for a creative strategist to help scale an ecom brand through high-performing ad creatives.

This is NOT just scripting. I need someone who understands why ads convert and can systematically create winning concepts.



What you’ll be doing:

Take my existing scripts and break down the structure (hook, problem, mechanism, proof, CTA)

Create variations of proven winners (same core idea, new angles, different hooks)

Develop completely new concepts based on customer psychology, not random ideas

Build out concepts in a structured format:

3–5 hooks per concept

1 main body (used across all variations)

Clear angle and target emotion/pain point

Identify patterns in winning ads and double down on what’s working

Suggest new directions based on performance (not opinions)



What I’m looking for:

Strong understanding of paid social (Meta/TikTok)

Experience with UGC-style ads (especially AI UGC is a plus)

Ability to think in angles, not just scripts

Knows how to write hooks that actually stop scroll (not generic)

Understands ICP deeply (especially
 audiences 
–65+)

Data-driven mindset (you care about CTR, hold rate, conversions)



Important:

One “concept” = 3–5 videos with the same body, different hooks

We iterate on winners, not constantly reinvent

Everything should be simple, clear, and built for performance



Bonus if you:

Have worked with ecom brands doing $10k+/day in spend

Can reference winning ads you’ve created or analyzed

Understand how to align creative with landing page messaging



If this sounds like you, send:

Examples of ads or concepts you’ve created

A quick breakdown of why you think they worked



Looking for someone long-term if it’s a good fit.

title: Production Assistant
description:
INTRODUCTION



Seed & Sprout is a fast-growing Australian direct-to-consumer eCommerce brand creating beautifully designed, planet-friendly products that make sustainable living simple and joyful.



With rapid growth across both DTC and wholesale channels, and an expanding product range, the business is investing in strengthening its product development and production support capability to enable scale, speed, and operational excellence.



ROLE PURPOSE



The Production Assistant plays a critical support role across product development, supplier coordination, and production administration.



This role is responsible for helping ensure new products, packaging, supplier communication, and production workflows are accurate, organised, and progressing smoothly from product sign-off through to shipment handover.



The position is highly detail-oriented and process-driven, acting as a central coordination point across suppliers, product development, packaging, systems, and internal teams.



While the role is administrative in nature, it requires strong ownership, organisation, problem-solving, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Product & Supplier Administration



* Set up new products across internal systems, including SKU creation, pricing, and product details

* Maintain and update product master data and SKU documentation

* Raise and manage purchase orders, tracking progress through to shipment handover

* Monitor production timelines and follow up with suppliers on key milestones

* Manage supplier documentation, including certifications and annual renewals



2. Supplier Coordination



* Act as a day-to-day point of contact for suppliers from product sign-off through to shipment handover

* Coordinate packaging requirements and artwork approvals with suppliers

* Manage product samples for quality checks, internal reviews, and photoshoots

* Support supplier communication to ensure timelines, specifications, and expectations are aligned



3. New Product Development Support



* Help prepare product handover documentation for internal teams

* Support product launch readiness through documentation and coordination

* Contribute to product insights and summaries for internal and external use



4. Packaging & Artwork



* Support creation of packaging artwork, including copy, care instructions, and layouts

* Coordinate artwork approvals, including shipper cartons and final production files

* Ensure packaging aligns with brand standards and sustainability requirements



5. Range & Market Insights



* Assist with competitor research, pricing reviews, and product benchmarking

* Support range planning and buying preparation

* Review customer feedback and product performance to inform product improvements



6. Reporting & Systems



* Keep internal tools and trackers up to date (e.g. 
, GTM, SKU master documentation)

* Add and manage products across planning and workflow systems

* Support basic reporting and trend analysis to assist decision-making



7. Ecommerce & Marketing Support



* Coordinate product samples for marketing and ecommerce needs

* Assist with product photography organisation and basic edits

* Support ecommerce product setup and content accuracy





CURRENT ENVIRONMENT & EXPECTATIONS



Seed & Sprout operates in a high-growth, high-SKU-complexity environment with frequent product launches, evolving product ranges, and multiple supplier relationships.



This role requires:



* High attention to detail across multiple moving parts

* Strong organisational discipline and follow-through

* Comfort working across both repetitive administration and project-based tasks

* The ability to work independently and manage competing deadlines

* Strong communication across suppliers and internal stakeholders

* Curiosity and a proactive mindset around product, packaging, and continuous improvement



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE



* Strong organisational skills and deadline management

* Excellent attention to detail and data accuracy

* Experience working with product administration, production coordination, or buying support

* Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

* Experience using workflow or planning tools such as 
, Asana or similar systems

* Exposure to supplier communication and purchase order management

* Shopify and Cin7 experience advantageous

* Calm, solutions-focused approach under pressure

* Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks



WORKING HOURS & STRUCTURE

Full-time, Monday to Friday (approx. 9am–5pm, with some flexibility)

Fully remote role based in the Philippines

Requires consistent availability aligned with Australian (Sydney) business hours



FIRST 90 DAYS — WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



* Develop strong understanding of systems, suppliers, and product workflows

* Take ownership of core product administration and production coordination tasks

* Ensure high accuracy across product data, purchase orders, documentation, and timelines

* Build effective working relationships with suppliers and internal stakeholders

* Support smooth execution of product launches and packaging workflows

* Begin contributing ideas for process improvement and operational efficiency



WHY JOIN SEED & SPROUT



You’ll be part of a growing, values-driven business with a collaborative remote team, where thoughtful product development and operational excellence are critical to scaling impact.



This role offers the opportunity to build deep expertise across product development, production, and supplier coordination while contributing to a brand committed to sustainability and beautifully designed products.
