title: CINEMATIC VIDEO EDITOR - Short-Form Ads & Social Content (AI-Savvy, Detail-Obsessed)
description:
CINEMATIC VIDEO EDITOR - Short-Form Ads & Social Content (AI-Savvy, Detail-Obsessed)







ABOUT VOURLY



Vourly is a U.S.-based video production company that connects clients with top-tier videographers and delivers cinematic-quality content. We're growing fast and looking for a dedicated video editor to join our team and own the post-production process for short-form ads and social media content.







This is not a generic editing gig. We need someone who treats every cut, transition, and caption like it matters - because it does. Our content drives real revenue for real businesses, and the quality of your edits directly impacts results.







WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



- Editing short-form video ads (15-60 seconds) for social media platforms (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
 Ads)



- Creating cinematic-quality edits with strong pacing, color grading, motion graphics, and sound design



- Writing and syncing captions/subtitles with ZERO errors - spelling, grammar, and timing must be flawless



- Collaborating closely with our team on creative direction, revisions, and feedback



- Turning around edits quickly without sacrificing quality



- Using AI tools (CapCut, Runway, Descript, ChatGPT, or similar) to speed up your workflow and improve output quality







WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We want someone who is genuinely passionate about editing - not someone who just applies to every job posting. You should get excited about making a 30-second ad feel like a movie trailer.







MUST-HAVES:



- 2+ years of video editing experience with a strong portfolio (short-form work is a huge plus)



- Proficiency in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, or equivalent professional NLE



- Excellent English - written and verbal. You'll be communicating with our U.S.-based team daily, so clear, professional communication is non-negotiable



- Experience with AI-assisted editing tools and workflows. We don't just want someone who "knows about" AI - we want someone who actively uses it to caption, color grade, generate assets, or enhance their edits



- Obsessive attention to detail, especially with captions and text overlays. If there's a typo in your caption, we'll notice. If there's a timing mismatch, we'll notice. This role requires perfection in text



- Reliable internet connection and ability to handle large video files







NICE-TO-HAVES:



- Motion graphics / animation skills



- Sound design experience



- Understanding of direct-response advertising and what makes an ad convert



- Experience editing for U.S.-based clients or brands







ABOUT THE ROLE



- Rate: $8 - $12 USD/hour (based on experience, with room to grow)



- Hours: Part-time to start (20 hrs/week), with ability to scale to full-time



- Schedule: Flexible, but you must be responsive during overlap hours with U.S. Pacific Time and deliver on agreed deadlines



- Tools Provided: We'll provide access to footage, project files, and any paid AI tools needed







HOW WE WORK



Communication is everything. We use async communication heavily, but when we message you, we expect a thoughtful reply - not a one-word answer. If something is unclear, ask. If you're stuck, speak up. If you disagree with creative direction, tell us why. We want a collaborator, not a yes-machine.







Speed matters, but so does quality. We'd rather you take an extra hour to get it right than rush out something mediocre. That said, if an edit takes you 3x longer than it should, this isn't the right fit.







IMPORTANT - PLEASE READ CAREFULLY: We review every application by hand. To help us identify candidates who actually read this full posting rather than copy-pasting a generic application, please include Vourly_2026_Editor as the very first line of your application message. Applications missing this will be deprioritized, as it tells us you may not pay close attention to details - and detail is everything in this role.







THE INTERVIEW PROCESS



If your application stands out, here's what happens next:



1. PORTFOLIO REVIEW - We'll look at your best short-form work



2. PAID TEST EDIT - We'll show you a finished ad we've already produced, then give you the raw footage. You edit it your way. We're evaluating your creative style, speed, and communication throughout this process



3. SHORT INTERVIEW - A quick video call to discuss workflow, availability, and fit







We're not looking for someone who copies our style - we want to see YOUR style. The test edit is your chance to show us what you bring to the table.







HOW TO APPLY



Send us:



1. A brief introduction - who you are, your editing experience, and why this role interests you



2. What editing software you use and how many years of experience you have with each



3. Your current or most recent job/work situation - are you freelancing, employed, or between roles?



4. Links to 3-5 of your best short-form edits (ads, reels, or social content preferred)



5. What AI tools you currently use in your editing workflow and how they improve your output



6. Your availability (hours per week and timezone)







We're excited to find the right person for this. If you love editing, care about quality, and want to grow with a company that values your craft - we want to hear from you.

title: Digital Ads Coordinator
description:
To Apply

To be considered for this role, please complete the application form:





The Opportunity

This could be one of the best jobs you’ll ever have.

We’re looking for an experienced Digital Ads Coordinator to join our remote team full-time.



About LickYourPhone

LickYourPhone Media is a leading restaurant marketing agency in Australia. We partner with restaurants, bars, hotels, and venues to amplify their brand presence through creative, data-driven digital advertising. You'll work alongside an amazing team that is passionate about hospitality, marketing, and great food.



The Role

We're looking for an experienced Digital Ads Coordinator who blends creative instinct with analytical precision. You'll manage a diverse portfolio of hospitality clients, running paid advertising campaigns across Meta 
 & Instagram), TikTok, and Google. From strategy development to performance reporting, you'll own the full campaign lifecycle and serve as each client's go-to advertising partner.



What You'll Do

Campaign Strategy & Execution

• Develop and launch paid advertising campaigns aligned with each client's goals and budget.

• Set up, manage, and 
 campaigns across
, Instagram, TikTok, and Google Ads.

• Create compelling ad creatives, copy, and visuals that resonate with target audiences.

• Monitor campaigns in real time, adjusting targeting, bidding, and creative elements as needed.



Audience Targeting & Optimisation

• Utilise audience targeting tools and retargeting strategies to maximise reach and engagement.

• Continuously refine segmentation based on performance data and emerging trends.

• Implement optimisation tactics including bid adjustments, ad scheduling, and audience exclusions.



Analytics & Reporting

• Monitor KPIs such as CTR, CPA, CPC, CPM, ROAS, and conversion rates.

• Prepare comprehensive performance reports with actionable insights and strategic recommendations.

• Deliver at least 8 monthly strategic recommendations per client.



Client Relationship Management

• Serve as the primary point of contact for your portfolio of clients.

• Provide regular campaign updates and proactively communicate optimisation opportunities.

• Build strong, long-term partnerships through transparency and exceptional service.



Compliance & Best Practices

• Ensure all campaigns comply with platform advertising policies and brand guidelines.

• Stay current with industry trends, platform updates, and emerging best practices.

• Address ad disapprovals and policy issues promptly and proactively.



What We're Looking For

Required

• Proven experience managing paid advertising campaigns on Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, and/or TikTok Ads.

• Proficiency in Canva and other creative tools for ad design.

• Strong copywriting skills with the ability to craft engaging, platform-specific ad copy.

• Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret campaign data and translate it into actionable strategy.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for confident client interactions.

• Proficiency in English

• Detail-oriented, organised, and able to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Self-motivated and able to work independently while collaborating with a team.

•Excellent and reliable internet connection.



Preferred

• Prior agency experience, particularly within the hospitality or food & beverage industry.

• Familiarity with A/B testing methodologies and conversion funnel optimisation.

• Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or a related field.



The Personality We're After

•Creative and innovative: you bring fresh ideas to every campaign.

•Resilient and composed under pressure: you thrive in a fast-paced agency environment.

•Proactive and self-driven: you take ownership and don't wait to be told what to do.

•A true team player: you collaborate openly and communicate with honesty and respect.

•Confident yet approachable: you handle client interactions with professionalism and warmth.



To Apply



To be considered for this role, please complete the application form:

title: eCommerce Graphic Designer (Application Form in Job Description)
description:
## Graphic Designer — Social Media & Ad Creatives



We're looking for a graphic designer with a sharp eye for design, strong DTC e-commerce experience, and the versatility to move between paid social, organic content, and occasional brand work. Most importantly, we want someone who's excited about helping women across Ireland take better care of themselves — through products that genuinely work.



## Who We Are



We're one of Ireland's leading women's health supplement brands. Our hero product is a clinically-backed collagen supplement that helps women in their 40s and beyond support their joints, hair, skin, and overall confidence as they navigate aging, perimenopause, and menopause. We're science-backed but our voice is warm, witty, and real — never clinical, never aspirational. (Brand name shared once we move forward.)



## How This Role Fits



We already have a graphic designer on the team, but she's focused on
 and running at capacity. We're looking to add one more designer to focus on social media creatives — both paid ads and organic — alongside occasional brand work. You'll work with our copy team, video editors, and growth lead to make sure every piece of creative we put out looks as good as the product behind it.



## What You'll Do



- **Paid social ad creatives** — Static image ads for Meta. You'll work directly with our Head of Growth on concepts, formats, and iteration based on what's performing.

- **Organic social content** — Feed posts, stories, and campaign visuals across Instagram,
, and TikTok. You'll work primarily with the Irish marketing team on this.

- **Brand collateral** — Occasional flyers, brochures, packaging touch-ups, event materials, and other one-off design needs.

- **Design system upkeep** — Keep our visual language consistent across everything we put out. Help us grow and refine the brand kit as we scale into new markets (UK and EU expansion is in motion).



A rough baseline is **15–20 polished design pieces per week** — but this number flexes a lot depending on the tools you're set up with (AI, templates, automation) and the priorities of the week. Our goal is to figure out together what your real capacity looks like and equip you to maximize it.



## Where This Could Go



We're in a growth phase. As the design function expands, there's a clear path for the right person to take more ownership over the brand visual direction and eventually lead a small design team. If that excites you, we want to hear about it.



## What You Need to Bring



- **3–5 years of e-commerce / DTC graphic design experience** — ideally with brands that run paid Meta ads at meaningful scale.

- **Strong eye for design.** This is the non-negotiable. Your portfolio should show real polish — clean type, considered composition, brand-appropriate visual decisions. Beautiful work matters more than tool fluency.

- **Photoshop and Illustrator proficiency.** Canva is fine to use, but Canva-only designers won't be a fit — we need someone who can handle more complex execution when needed.

- **A portfolio with DTC ad creatives and social feed work.** If you've worked with women's health, wellness, beauty, or women-focused brands, that's a significant plus.

- **Strong communication in English** (written and verbal).

- **Reliable internet, your own equipment, and a quiet workspace** for occasional video calls.



Nice to have (not required):

- Product photography editing / retouching

- Experience designing for European markets



## How We Work



- **Remote, async-friendly.** We don't track hours or require time-in/time-out. We do expect you to be responsive during Philippine working hours (9 AM – 6 PM PHT) for questions, feedback, and quick async collaboration.

- **Occasional after-hours meetings.** Because of the Irish time zone, some calls happen between 6–8 PM PHT. These are scheduled in advance, never last-minute.

- **You'll work primarily with our Irish marketing team** on organic and brand work, and with our Philippines-based Head of Growth on paid ads.

- **Brand systems exist** — we have a brand kit, ad templates, and a clear visual language. But we want someone who'll help us evolve and strengthen those systems, not just execute against them.



## Compensation & Setup



- **$600–$700 USD per month**, depending on experience.

- **Full-time contract role**, paid monthly via Wise directly to you.

- **Remote, work from anywhere** (Philippines preferred for time zone).

- This is a contractor role. You're responsible for your own taxes and government benefits (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG if applicable).



## Hiring Process



1. **Application** — Fill out the form linked below.

2. **Initial review** — We'll review your portfolio and answers within a few days.

3. **Interview or trial** — Depending on the strength of the application, you'll either go to a short interview first or straight to a quick trial project. The trial is unpaid and small in scope — designed for us to assess your work, and just as importantly, for you to assess the kind of work you'd be doing with us.

4. **Offer** — If both sides feel it's a fit, we move to onboarding.



## Why This Role Matters



Every ad we run, every social post, every visual that lands in front of an Irish woman thinking about her health is a chance to earn her trust. Great design is what makes that chance count. If you want to do work that's seen by a real audience, that drives real results, and that helps real women feel better in their own skin — we'd love to hear from you.



DO NOT
 TO APPLY, fill out the application form below to submit your application:

title: Executive Assistant to the Executives
description:
Job post summary

Date posted: April 15, 2026

Pay: 47,728.00 - 71,592.00 per month

Work Location: Remote



Submit your Application here: 
/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW





Job description:



About the Role

We are looking for highly experience in Executive Assistant with a minimum of 5 years work experience. This is a mid-level hybrid role sitting at the intersection of creator acquisition and operational excellence. You will be the engine that keeps a steady flow of qualified creators moving into our sales pipeline, and the safeguard that ensures nothing falls through the cracks once a deal is closed.



You will not be running sales calls — our partner handles those. What you will own is everything that happens before and after: sourcing and engaging creators across platforms, filling the partner's calendar with qualified prospects, and then taking full ownership of the contract, onboarding, and setup process from signature through to kickoff.



This role is well suited to someone who has spent two or more years in outreach, partnerships, operations, or a similar function and is ready to take on broader ownership across a full creator lifecycle. You bring structure, initiative, and a closer's mentality to everything you do.



What You Will Be Doing Lead Generation & Outreach



- Proactively source and qualify creators across
, Instagram, and other relevant platforms

- Identify and obtain personal contact information using a combination of manual research techniques and specialist tooling

- Execute outreach via direct messaging and
, with a strong focus on conversion

- Develop and bring your own lead generation ideas and angles alongside established playbooks — we want your thinking, not just your execution

- Build and maintain clean, accurate lead and pipeline records in Airtable with rigorous data hygiene

- Book qualified prospects directly into the partner's calendar for closing calls



Contract Management & Creator Onboarding

- Upon deal closure, assume full ownership of the post-sale process

- Issue contracts reflecting each creator's specific commercial terms — precision here is non-negotiable, as we are legally bound by what is documented

- Manage signature collection and all back-and-forth on amendment requests, including drafting redlines with AI assistance and routing documents through DocuSign

- Set up each signed creator in Google Chat and Notion in accordance with our standard operating procedures

- Schedule kickoff calls with our Head of Client Success to ensure a seamless handover



What We Are Looking ForExperience & Track Record

- 2+ years of experience in a role involving outreach, business development, partnerships, operations, or a closely related function

- Some exposure to cold outreach with measurable results — you do not need an extensive track record, but you should be able to speak to what worked and why

- Experience maintaining records in Airtable, a CRM, or a comparable project management tool

- Prior exposure to contracts or commercial documentation is advantageous but not required



Skills & Attributes

- Closer mentality. You own outcomes, not tasks. If a signed contract is the goal and a creator goes quiet, you follow up — at 48 hours, and again, and again — until it is done. You do not mark something complete until it actually is.

- Highly organised. You maintain clean systems, think in processes, and understand that good records are a business-critical function, not an administrative afterthought.

- Detail-oriented. Particularly around contracts, commercial terms, and data integrity. Errors in these areas have real consequences, and you treat them accordingly.

- Self-starter. You generate your own ideas for lead generation and process improvement rather than waiting to be directed. You see gaps and fill them.

- Clear, professional written English. You write concisely and persuasively — whether drafting a cold outreach message or following up on a contract signature.

- Confident AI user. You actively use tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini for problem-solving, drafting, and contract work. This is not optional — it is part of how we operate.



Practical Requirements

- Reliable equipment and a stable, high-speed internet connection — this is a hard requirement

- Availability across a broad working window; our creators and partners operate across multiple time zones, and flexibility is more important than fixed hours

- preferably from top universities in the Philippines (UP, Ateneo, La Salle, UST)



Why This Role

This is a role with genuine ownership from day one. You will not be executing a narrow set of tasks — you will be responsible for two critical functions of the business and will have the latitude to improve the systems and processes you work within. For the right candidate, it is an opportunity to grow quickly, take on commercially significant responsibilities, and make a visible impact on creator growth.

title: Operations Lead - Marketing & Conversion Strategy
description:
Application Link: 
/EmFAppF



OVERVIEW

We're looking for an Operations Lead to own and scale the revenue engine across our creator portfolio.



This is not a VA role. This is for a Growth Marketer who understands funnels, conversion, and customer psychology — and knows how to turn that into measurable revenue.



You won't be doing manual execution. You'll be designing the systems and strategies that drive performance, working through a team of VAs.



Your success is measured by one thing: revenue growth.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

> Funnel Architecture - Design and optimize the full subscriber journey — from acquisition through retention.

> Messaging & Monetization - Own the structure, cadence, and performance of messaging across all creators.

> Lifecycle Marketing - Build and refine welcome flows, re-engagement, re-subscription, and win-back campaigns.

> Performance Optimization - Track conversion metrics, identify gaps, and continuously improve pricing, offers, and messaging.

> Team Leadership - Lead a team of VAs to execute your strategy with speed and consistency.





WHO YOU ARE

> Growth-Focused Marketer - You understand funnels, conversion triggers, and how to move people from interest to action.

> Systems Thinker - You think in angles and structure — not just individual messages. You build, not just write.

> Data-Driven Operator - You use metrics to identify problems and drive decisions. Gut feel is backed by numbers.

> Ownership Mentality - You take responsibility for outcomes, not just execution. Results are your accountability.

> Relevant Experience - Background in high-volume digital sales, e-commerce, or direct response marketing. OF experience is a plus, not required.



THE OFFER

>Base Salary - $1,200 – $1,600 / month (depending on experience)

> Performance Bonus - Directly tied to revenue growth and portfolio performance

> Growth Path - Direct path to senior leadership as the operation scales

> Environment - Fully remote, performance-focused





This is a performance-driven role with real upside. High performers grow their compensation in line with the revenue they generate.

title: Chief Operating Officer (COO) | Must have COO experience
description:
Compensation

USD $5,000 – $6,000 per month, depending on experience

Work Setup: Remote

Reports To: CEO



How to Apply:

To apply, please complete this form:


/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW



We are seeking an experienced Chief Operating Officer (COO) to lead overall business operations, revenue performance, and organizational execution across client accounts and internal teams.



This role is responsible for driving operational strategy, scaling systems, improving profitability, and ensuring strong leadership across department heads. The COO will work closely with the CEO and leadership team to optimize performance, team structure, and operational efficiency.



Teams Overseen: Operations, Sales, Messaging, Support, and Department Managers



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Strategy

- Lead day-to-day company operations and ensure execution aligns with business goals

- Build scalable systems, workflows, and SOPs to improve efficiency and profitability

- Monitor key business metrics including revenue growth, operational efficiency, retention, and cost control

- Identify operational risks and implement solutions proactively

- Drive monthly and quarterly initiatives with clear KPIs and accountability



Leadership & Team Management

- Lead and mentor department heads, supervisors, and operational leaders

- Build strong accountability structures and performance management systems

- Oversee hiring strategy, leadership development, and organizational structure

- Improve cross-team collaboration and communication

- Maintain high team morale while enforcing performance standards



Performance, Quality & Reporting

- Establish dashboards and reporting systems for leadership visibility

- Ensure operational quality, compliance, and account security standards

- Oversee revenue optimization strategies and performance improvements

- Present weekly and monthly performance insights with actionable recommendations

- Support decision-making through data-driven analysis



Qualifications

Required Experience

- Minimum 4+ years of leadership experience in operations, business management, or scaling teams

- Proven experience managing managers or department leaders

- Background in digital businesses, online sales, creator platforms, or subscription-based environments is a strong advantage



Skills & Traits

- Strong strategic thinking with hands-on execution ability

- Excellent leadership, coaching, and decision-making skills

- Data-driven with strong business and revenue awareness

- Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple departments

- Clear communicator with strong accountability and ownership mindset

- Strong focus on compliance, risk management, and operational stability

description:
Application Link:

We’re looking for experienced and confident sales representatives who can build rapport with international clients, drive conversations, and convert engagement into revenue.



This role is not just customer support we want strong communicators who know how to keep conversations flowing, identify opportunities, and upsell naturally. If you are persuasive, engaging, and competitive about hitting targets, you’ll thrive here.



You’ll receive industry-leading training, but we’re especially interested in candidates who already understand online sales, engagement psychology, and closing techniques through.



Working Hours

- 8 hours per day

- 6 days per week

- Fully remote



Earnings & Benefits

- Competitive base pay with strong earning potential:

- $700 – $1,500 per month depending on performance

- Top performers can earn additional incentives and bonuses based on engagement, conversions, and upselling success.



Additional benefits include:

- 2 days of paid holiday per month

- 4 days of paid sick leave per year

- Fully remote – work from anywhere

- Performance-based incentives for top sales representatives

- Comprehensive training in sales psychology, engagement, and closing techniques

- High-performing representatives can significantly exceed base earnings through incentives.





Key Responsibilities

-Engage international clients through chat support, building rapport and maintaining engaging conversations

- Identify opportunities to upsell and promote premium services naturally during conversations

- Keep conversations active, interesting, and focused on conversion

- Handle multiple conversations simultaneously while maintaining quality and attention to detail

- Track interactions and performance using Google Sheets and Notion

- Maintain detailed logs and follow internal communication protocols

- Work toward daily and monthly revenue targets



Ideal Candidate

We are looking for candidates who are confident communicators and natural closers.

Preferred qualifications include:

- Excellent written English (C1 or higher) — near-native fluency preferred

- Experience in sales , online engagement, or conversion-focused messaging

- Ability to guide conversations toward purchases or upgrades

- Fast and accurate typing while managing multiple chats

- Strong understanding of client psychology and persuasive communication

- Highly organised, reliable, and performance-driven

- Comfortable using Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, etc.)

- Experience working with international clients is a strong advantage



What Makes Someone Successful in This Role

The best representatives in our team are:

- Engaging storytellers

- Confident sales communicators

- Able to read client signals and respond strategically

- Motivated by performance bonuses and hitting targets

- If you enjoy turning conversations into results, this role offers strong earning potential and long-term growth.

Contract Management & Creator Onboarding

- Issue contracts reflecting each creator's specific commercial terms — precision here is non-negotiable, as we are legally bound by what is documented

- Manage signature collection and all back-and-forth on amendment requests, including drafting redlines with AI assistance and routing documents through DocuSign

- Set up each signed creator in Google Chat and Notion in accordance with our standard operating procedures

- Schedule kickoff calls with our Head of Client Success to ensure a seamless handover



What We Are Looking ForExperience & Track Record

- 2+ years of experience in a role involving outreach, business development, partnerships, operations, or a closely related function

- Some exposure to cold outreach with measurable results — you do not need an extensive track record, but you should be able to speak to what worked and why

- Experience maintaining records in Airtable, a CRM, or a comparable project management tool

- Prior exposure to contracts or commercial documentation is advantageous but not required



Skills & Attributes

- Closer mentality. You own outcomes, not tasks. If a signed contract is the goal and a creator goes quiet, you follow up — at 48 hours, and again, and again — until it is done. You do not mark something complete until it actually is.

- Highly organised. You maintain clean systems, think in processes, and understand that good records are a business-critical function, not an administrative afterthought.

- Detail-oriented. Particularly around contracts, commercial terms, and data integrity. Errors in these areas have real consequences, and you treat them accordingly.

- Self-starter. You generate your own ideas for lead generation and process improvement rather than waiting to be directed. You see gaps and fill them.

- Clear, professional written English. You write concisely and persuasively — whether drafting a cold outreach message or following up on a contract signature.

- Confident AI user. You actively use tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini for problem-solving, drafting, and contract work. This is not optional — it is part of how we operate.



Practical Requirements

- Reliable equipment and a stable, high-speed internet connection — this is a hard requirement

- Availability across a broad working window; our creators and partners operate across multiple time zones, and flexibility is more important than fixed hours



Why This Role

This is a role with genuine ownership from day one. You will not be executing a narrow set of tasks — you will be responsible for two critical functions of the business and will have the latitude to improve the systems and processes you work within. For the right candidate, it is an opportunity to grow quickly, take on commercially significant responsibilities, and make a visible impact on creator growth.

title: GHL & Meta Ads Specialist — Marketing Systems (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About Kaizen Collective

We're an Australian marketing systems agency. We build and run client acquisition engines for service businesses — mortgage brokers, physios, real estate agents, coaches, tradies.

The system is always the same: Meta ads, GHL sub-accounts, landing pages, lead flows, automations. We install it, we run it, clients get results.

We need someone who can build and manage that system fast, cleanly, and without handholding.



What This Role Actually Is

1. This is a technical execution role. You will be given templates, snapshots, and briefs. Your job is to move fast and build things that work.

2. Every new client needs the same system to be stood up. You need to do it quickly, do it correctly, and know what to do when something doesn't work.

3. The two things you need to be genuinely excellent at:



GoHighLevel — This is your primary tool. Every week you will be setting up sub-accounts from snapshots, configuring custom values, building landing pages from our templates, setting up forms and lead flows, and building or editing workflows and automations. You need to be fast at this. Not learning-as-you-go fast. Actually fast.



Meta Ads — You will build campaigns from scratch for each client. Campaign structure, ad sets, targeting, pixel/CAPI setup, ad copy, and daily performance management across multiple accounts. You know what good looks like and you know how to fix it when it's not working.

Client-facing communication is not part of this role right now. That's handled separately. You focus on building.



Day to Day



1. Setting up GHL sub-accounts from snapshot — custom values, integrations, calendar, pipeline

2. Building landing pages and forms from our templates — fast and clean

3. Building and editing workflows and automation sequences

4. Writing ad copy and setting up Meta campaigns from scratch

5. Managing active ad accounts daily — spend, CPL, CTR, frequency, optimisation calls

6. Flagging issues early without being asked





You Need to Have Done This Before

GoHighLevel:

1. Sub-account setup from a snapshot including all custom value configuration

2. Landing page builds from existing templates

3. Form and lead capture setup

4. Workflow and automation builds — triggers, actions, conditions, branching

5. Calendar and pipeline configuration



Meta Ads:



Lead gen campaigns built from scratch — not boosted posts

Campaign structure, CBO, ad set targeting, creative setup

Pixel and CAPI configuration

Daily account management across multiple clients

Performance diagnosis — you know why CPL is high and what to do about it





You're The Right Person If:



1. You can set up a GHL sub-account from a snapshot , fast. 

2. You've built landing pages in GHL and understand how the flow connects to workflows

a. you know how to publish them with all details complete 

3. You've managed Meta lead gen campaigns with real spend and real accountability

4. You work fast without sacrificing accuracy

5. You spot problems before someone has to tell you about them

6. You don't need to be managed — you need to be directed



This Is Not The Role If:



1. GHL landing pages take you a full day to figure out

2. Your Meta experience is mostly boosted posts or awareness campaigns

3. You need someone to walk you through every step

4. You prefer client interaction to technical work





Role Details



Full-time (40 hours/week)

Remote — work from anywhere

Australian business hours (AEST overlap, minimum 6 hours)

Start: ASAP

Salary: Depending on applicant





How To Apply

Send your application with:



Your resume

A Loom video (3–5 mins): Screen share and walk us through a GHL sub-account you've set up from a snapshot. Show the landing page, the form, and the workflow that follows the lead. Then show us a Meta Ads campaign you've built and managed.

One written answer: You receive a snapshot to install for a new client. You set it up, but the form isn't pushing leads into the pipeline correctly. What do you do?



Applications without the Loom walkthrough will not be reviewed.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller

About Us



We are a real estate investment and acquisitions company that buys and sells residential properties. Our team specializes in working with motivated sellers, and we’re looking for an experienced cold caller to help us generate quality leads and set appointments.



Role & Responsibilities

Training, scripts, and ongoing support.



Opportunity to grow into a long-term role within a fast-scaling real estate company.

title: Inbound Sales Closer
description:
This is not customer service. This is sales.



We run adventure tourism experiences across 10+ US locations —  Adventure Tourism. 



Customers call us every day ready to book. Your job is to close them, upsell them, and make sure everything is fulfilled correctly.

What you'll be doing:



Answering inbound calls from warm leads who are already interested

Asking discovery questions — who's coming, what's the occasion, first time?

Painting the experience so they feel it before they book

Closing on the call — getting the deposit or full payment before they hang up

Upselling packages, add-ons, and upgrades on every booking

Fulfilling bookings — confirming details, scheduling, coordinating with operators

You are the full cycle — from the first hello to making sure they show up



We are a third-party service. You'll be representing multiple adventure brands across different locations. We provide all the systems, scripts, and training you need.

What makes this role different:



Every call is recorded and scored by AI across 6 categories

You'll see your score within minutes of hanging up

You get specific coaching feedback on exactly what to improve

We provide 5+ hours of video training, live shadowing, and ongoing coaching

All systems and tools are provided — CRM, phone system, booking platforms



Requirements:



Phone sales experience (even brief — we train the methodology)

Clear English accent — you'll be speaking with US customers

You understand the difference between answering questions and closing a sale

Reliable internet and quiet workspace

Available during US business hours

Responsible and detail-oriented — you handle fulfillment too, not just the sale



What we don't want:



Someone who gives the price and waits for the customer to decide

Someone who ends calls with "I'll send you more info"

Someone who treats every call like an information line



Compensation:



Base hourly rate + performance bonuses

$2 per confirmed booking

$2 per successful upsell

Top performers earn $10-12/hour effective rate

The more you close, the more you earn



Hiring process:



Send a 60-second voice note explaining your sales experience and why you're a closer — not a text, a voice note. We want to hear you.

5-minute role-play call — you sell us an jet ski experience. We score it with AI. Score above 50 and you move forward.

2-week paid trial with full training.



No text applications will be reviewed.

mbers.

title: Design Lead
description:
Job Overview:



As the Design Lead, you'll be guiding the design team to build custom websites and graphics for clients. You'll shape and improve design processes while working closely with the SEO and web development teams. You'll also manage client communications to get design approvals. This means talking with clients, understanding their feedback, and passing it on to the design team, or handling some design mockups/updates yourself. Since you'll be
ing clients daily, strong communication skills are required. 



Furthermore, we expect that you can:



- manage a design team 

- oversee and always be on top of the design projects (if you are not proactive, this is not for you!)

- improve existing design processes to streamline web design and development

- identify and incorporate the best designs and processes into our system so that we can continuously improve output and quality

- developing and maintaining design libraries (not pretty designs, but instead serve a purpose for our SEO clients)

- communicate with clients and understand their needs

- Communicate client business goals to the dev team to make sure that designs have a business impact on clients

- collaborate with the SEO team to back up their campaigns

- Do quality checking of the live URL before and after launch



Job Requirements:



1. A Paypal account (we pay through Paypal).

3. Advance-level knowledge of the software Figma; Proficiency in other design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite and Sketch is a plus

4. Knowledge/experience and a thorough understanding of designing (or building) several WordPress (or any CMS) websites.

5. Has experience using project management software such as ClickUp, Asana, Airtable, or similar tools.

6. Strong portfolio showcasing a variety of design projects and styles

7. A deep understanding of design principles, user-centered design, user experience (UX) design, and the ability to look for those and translate them into design/development.

8. Exceptional communication skills with solid English proficiency, both written and verbal

9. Demonstrates understanding of SEO requirements in design decisions

10. With a keen eye for details and quality control

• Translate brand identity and UX goals into engaging, high-quality layouts

• Ensure websites are visually appealing, functional, and optimized

• Collaborate on design concepts using tools like Figma

• Stay up to date with the latest design trends and Webflow features



Requirements:



• Preferred candidates aged 25 and above

• Minimum 1 year of experience using Webflow

• Portfolio showcasing at least 10 completed Webflow projects

• Proficiency in Figma and Webflow

• Strong general experience in designing and building websites with a high standard of visual quality



What We Offer:



• 45,000 - 50,000 monthly salary

• Remote position

• Working hours: 12:00 PM to 8:00 PM, Monday to Friday

• Approximately 12 paid holidays per year



To Apply:



Please send your CV and portfolio.

We can’t wait to see what you’ve created!

title: Tester – GitHub Pipelines & Test Automation (Remote)
description:
Join one of Australia’s leading database development companies and work on real world systems used by well known international clients.



At DB Gurus, you’ll build high quality, scalable database driven applications while continuing to grow your skills in modern technologies such as AWS and AI assisted development tools—all within a supportive, fully remote team.



About DB Gurus

DB Gurus is a specialist database development company with over 16 years’ experience delivering reliable, easy to use solutions for clients across multiple industries worldwide.



At DB Gurus, you’ll help ensure the quality of scalable, database driven applications while expanding your experience with modern testing tools, GitHub Pipelines, and emerging technologies such as AWS and AI assisted tools—within a supportive, fully remote team.



The Role

We’re looking for a Tester with strong experience in GitHub Pipelines and test automation who takes pride in delivering high?quality, well?tested software and enjoys working closely with developers and project teams. 

As a Tester, you will be responsible for validating software functionality, reliability, and performance across multiple projects. You’ll work closely with developers, QA, and project managers to ensure testing is embedded throughout the development lifecycle.



This role suits someone who is detail oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a structured, process driven environment.



Rate: AUD $6 – $7 per hour (based on experience)



What We Offer

• Fully remote, work from home role

• Flexible working arrangements

• Stable, long term contract

• Supportive and approachable management

• Opportunity to work on real world, production systems

• Collaborative team environment with developers and QA support



Key Responsibilities

• Review requirements and specifications to design clear, comprehensive test cases

• Create, manage, and execute test cases using GitHub Pipelines

• Perform manual and automated testing across applications and systems

• Design and maintain automated test scripts to improve test coverage and efficiency

• Identify, document, and track defects, working closely with developers to validate fixes

• Participate in test planning, estimation, and status reporting

• Contribute to the continuous improvement of testing processes, frameworks, and standards



Requirements



Essential:

• Proven experience as a Tester / QA Engineer or similar role

• Strong hands on experience with GitHub Pipelines

• Experience with test automation tools and frameworks (e.g. Selenium, Appium, or similar)

• Solid understanding of SDLC and testing methodologies

• Strong attention to detail and commitment to high quality outcomes

• Clear communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with remote teams

• Honest, reliable, and able to follow standards and specifications



Nice to have:

• Familiarity with C# 
 based applications

•  Copilot CLI experience

• AI Agent experience

• Experience testing database driven systems



Availability:

• Preferably available for at least 6 hours between 9:00 am and 5:00 pm (GMT+10)



How to Apply

If you wish to apply, please send your application starting with:

“Ref: Tester”

and include three of your key strengths.



Please note: we only hire individuals. Recruitment agencies need not apply.

title: Bilingual Scheduling  Manager (English–Spanish) Cleaning Company – Full Time Remote
description:
We are residential cleaning company in the United States and we are looking for a highly organized, reliable, and detail-oriented Bilingual Scheduling  Manager to join our team long-term.



In this role you  will manage the schedules of cleaners and schedule clients (existing and new). You must be able to communicate clearly with clients in English and with cleaners in Spanish, using a friendly but professional tone.



If you love organization, problem-solving, scheduling, and keeping operations running smoothly, this is the perfect position for you.



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES



DAILY SCHEDULING & DISPATCH

• Manage and update the daily cleaning schedule

• Assign cleaners to jobs based on availability, skills, and travel distance

• Handle last-minute changes, rescheduling, and cancellations

• Ensure all jobs move through scheduling, confirming and completion

• Finalize the next day’s schedule (plan ahead 2 - 7days) 



CLIENT COMMUNICATION (ENGLISH)

• Send confirmations to clients using templates

• Handle scheduling  details  for new clients and and/or rescheduling or special requests 

• Maintain clear and professional communication at all times



CLEANER COMMUNICATION (SPANISH)

• Collaborate  daily with cleaners to organize their schedule based on availability 

• Handle questions, delays, cancellations

• Reassign jobs as needed



OPERATIONS MANAGEMENT

• Maintain detailed notes for all clients and cleaners

• Keep all schedules organized inside our system

• Coordinate with our VAs for repetitive tasks

• Identify and resolve scheduling issues quickly

• Communicate calmly under pressure and during busy days



TEAM COLLABORATION

• Work closely with the owner and support VAs

• Attend brief daily check-ins as required

• Provide end-of-day summaries when needed



REQUIREMENTS

• Fluent in English and Spanish (required)

• Excellent communication skills in both languages

• Strong organizational and multitasking ability

• Experience in scheduling, dispatching, or operations preferred

• Ability to work U.S. hours (full-time) (part time could be considered if you are strong candidate)

• Fast typing and comfort with technology

• Ability to handle a high volume of messages

• Problem-solving skills and the ability to think independently

• Calm, reliable, and proactive personality

• Experience with cleaning companies, home services, or similar industries is a plus



TOOLS WE USE (Experience helpful but not required)

• OpenPhone (Quo)

• Service Autopilot and Booking Koala 

• Google Sheets

• OneNote





Training will be provided — but you must naturally be organized, disciplined, and able to manage many moving parts at once.



WORK HOURS & COMPENSATION

• Full-time, long-term position (Part time can be considered if you are strong candidate 

• Must be available during U.S. business hours (Eastern Time preferred)

• Salary range: $800–$1,300 USD per month (depending on experience)/ Weekly Pay and Paid Training 

• Pay increases based on performance

• Stable, long-term job in a growing company



HOW TO APPLY

Please send:

 1. Your resume

 2. A short video or text explaining why you are a good fit

 3. Your availability (hours per day and timezone)



Only apply if you are fluent in both English and Spanish and are looking for a long-term, stable role.



Regards, 



Carissa

title: Executive assistant / Operations manager
description:
**Location:** Remote (strong overlap with U.S. Eastern Time)

**Type:** Full-time

**Reports to:** CEO (Apeing & Fuel Nutrition)



Apeing is a fast-moving Web3/DeFi project building next-gen crypto trading and creator experiences.

Fuel Nutrition is a high-growth DTC beauty & wellness brand scaling through social and affiliate-driven e-commerce.



Role Summary



We’re hiring a proactive, detail-obsessed operator to be the CEO’s right hand across two companies. You’ll own weekly execution: driving projects to done, unblocking teams, hiring great people, and keeping the CEO’s schedule, recruiting pipeline, and communications crisp. On the Fuel side you’ll run the e-commerce operating rhythm and manage the store team. On the Apeing side you’ll function as an Executive Assistant / Chief-of-Staff-lite to ensure velocity.



---



## Core Responsibilities



### 1) Fuel Nutrition — Operations Management



* **Weekly Operating Rhythm:** Own the Monday plan ? Friday wrap cadence; ensure >90% completion of weekly priorities.

* **Project Management:** Maintain the master roadmap (launches, promos, inventory, CX initiatives). Break projects into tasks, owners, deadlines; monitor burn-down and remove blockers.

* **Team Management:** Lead daily standups; assign work to CX, content, design, ops, and creators’ support; track performance and SLAs.

* **E-commerce Ops:** Oversee Shopify/Amazon/TikTok Shop readiness, PDP accuracy, pricing/promos, bundles, inventory ETAs, and merchandising calendar.

* **CX & Quality:** Ensure Gorgias/Helpdesk response times, returns/exchanges process quality, review sentiment, QA on shipments & packaging updates.

* **Vendors & Logistics:** Coordinate 3PL/manufacturing timelines, purchase orders, inbound/outbound shipments, and restock alerts.

* **Performance Tracking:** Build and maintain dashboards for GMV, AOV, CAC/ROAS (where applicable), fulfillment SLAs, creator GMV, and subscription metrics.

* **SOPs & Compliance:** Create/update SOPs for store ops, CX, creator payouts, coupon governance, and promo calendars.



2) Apeing Dex — Executive Assistant to the CEO



* **Inbox & Calendar Control:** Triage
/DMs, prep briefings, protect focus blocks, schedule internal/external meetings, assemble agendas & notes, and ensure follow-through.

* **Recruiting & Talent Pipeline:** Post roles on LinkedIn, screen applicants, run initial screens, manage the candidate tracker, schedule panels, and coordinate offers.

* **Project Coordination:** Track engineering/design/BD workstreams; document decisions; chase owners for updates; highlight risks and dependencies.

* **Documentation:** Prepare board/partner updates, meeting notes, lite research briefs (competitors, partners, ecosystems).





3) Cross-Company PMO (Both)



* **Single Source of Truth:** Maintain shared Notion/Trello/Asana boards with goals, owners, and timelines for both companies.

* **Weekly CEO Brief:** 1-pager with status, blockers, next actions, hiring updates, and decisions needed.

* **Bottleneck Radar:** Detect slippage early; propose options; escalate with data.

* **Confidential Initiatives:** Handle sensitive docs, contracts, and negotiations support with discretion.



---



## KPIs / Scorecard



* **Weekly task completion rate:** ? 90?ross active projects

* **Hiring pipeline:** Time-to-first-interview ? 5 business days; time-to-offer ? 25 days

* **Meeting hygiene:** 100% agendas sent ? 12 hrs prior; 100% notes + action items within 6 hrs

* **E-com ops SLAs:** 3PL on-time fulfillment ? 98%; CX first-response time ? 2 hrs (business hrs)

* **Data discipline:** Dashboards updated daily; zero stale metrics >24 hrs on critical boards



## Qualifications



* 4–7+ years in **operations/project management** and/or **EA/Chief-of-Staff** roles in fast-growing startups.

* Proven experience running an **e-commerce** operating cadence (Shopify/Amazon/TikTok Shop) **or** product/engineering coordination AND working in a tech or blockchain company a HUGE PLUS!

* Strong people management: running standups, assigning work, and holding owners accountable.

* Excellent written communication; executive-level judgment and confidentiality.

* Comfortable in **Web3/crypto** culture (you don’t need to be an engineer, but you speak the language and can track technical projects and talk to devs).

* Advanced proficiency with: Notion or Asana/Trello, Google Workspace, Slack/
, GSheets (lookups/pivots), Zoom/Calendly. Bonus: Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, Gorgias/Helpdesk, Phantom/Wallet basics, Figma.



---



## Tools You’ll Use (typical stack)



* **PM/Docs:** Notion, Asana/Trello, Google Docs/Sheets/Slides

* **Comms:** Slack, 
, Gmail, Zoom, Calendly

* **E-com:** Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, TikTok Shop, Gorgias/Helpdesk, 3PL portal

* **Analytics:** Looker/Datastudio or similar dashboards, ad platform dashboards

* **Web3 (nice-to-have):** Phantom, Solana explorers, Dune/Flipside (basic queries)



---



## Working Style



* Owner mindset, bias to action, and calm under pressure.

* Ruthless prioritization; you protect the CEO’s time and the teams’ throughput.

* You love clarity—clear goals, clear owners, clear due dates—and you enforce it.



---



## 30/60/90 Day Plan



**Day 30:** Implement weekly cadence, build master project tracker, stabilize calendar/inbox, publish KPI dashboard v1.

**Day 60:** Hit ?90% weekly completion, reduce CX response time to target, 3 key hires in final stages, SOPs v1 live.

**Day 90:** Zero major bottlenecks, full on-time promo/launch execution, hiring funnel humming, dashboards automated.



---



## Compensation



Competitive salary + performance bonus; benefits commensurate with experience and location.



## How to Apply



Submit your resume and a brief note sharing 1) an issue or operations turnaround you led, 2) your favorite PM stack, and 3) your earliest start date and salary expecations. 4) example of CEO tasks u handled and your top skill set.

NON SUBMISSION OF THIS WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED!

---



### Optional Add-Ons (use in your LinkedIn post/application form)



**Screening Questions**



1. Share a link/screenshot of a project dashboard you built (redact sensitive info).

2. Describe a time you reduced time-to-ship by changing the operating cadence.

3. Which e-co
trics do you track daily vs. weekly, and why?

4. In 5 bullets, outline your method to triage a CEO’s inbox/calendar.



**Must-Have Work Samples**



* Example of a weekly exec brief (1 page).

* A hiring tracker you’ve maintained.

* A standard operating procedure (SOP) you authored.
